pericopes.title: Thempu ho bat le atohdiu kin
Thu ngailou jeh a gentheina ho
Pathen taitom jeh a suhdihna dan
Choldo kum ho leh Jubilee kum
Thua nunlou jeh a Talen kimatsah  (Deut. 28:15-68)
Thenso kinbolna manchah dang Dan ho

chapters.text: Pakaiyin Mose ahinkouvin, kikhopna ponbuh a konin ajah a thu aseiyin hitin ati;

“Israel chate jah a thu seipeh in lang ajah uva hitin seiyin, ‘Nalah uva Pakai henga thilto nom mi aum a ahileh, ama chun ipi gancha hijongle bong hon lah a kona jong kel-hon lah a kona jong ato jeng thei ahi.

“Amipa thilto ding chu bong hon lah a kona pumgo thilto ahileh, nolna beihel achal khat ato ding ahin; hiche athilto ding chu Pakai angsunga santhei ahina dinga kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula tosah ding ahi.
Agancha tohpa chun apumgo thilto luchanga chu akhut angap’a, athilto chu ama kithoi damna dinga kisanpeh ding ahiye.

Chutengle aman bongchal chu Pakai angsunga atha ding, Aaron chapate thempu ho chun athisan chu Pakai henga atouva, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula kitung maicham mai ageigol gola chu athe khum dingu ahi.
Chule aman agantha chu avun a lip doh a asa chu achen ding ahin;
hita chu thempupa Aaron chapaten maicham chunga chu mei achouva, meikong chunga chu thing alom loma aset diu,
Aaron chapate thempuho chun asa kisempansa ho, aluchang, athao, hiti ho chu maicham chunga mei kitih chunga thing lom kise chunga chu agol gola a jam dingu ahi;

asungsa jouse leh akeng ho vang chu twiya asop ngim ding ahiye. Chutengle atahsa ijakai aboncha chu apumpia thempupan pumgo thilto dinga chu agovam ding, hichu meiya kigouvam thilto hiya, Pakai dinga jong agim nam tuitah hi ding ahiye.
“Pumgo dinga thiltoh pa thilto chu kel-hon a kona kila ahiya kelngoi ham, kelcha khat ham ahijongle, nolna bei achalma ma ato ding ahi.
Chuteng aman aganto chu maicham sah lam, Pakai angsunga chu atha ding, Aaron chapate thempu ho chun athisan chu maicham kimvel ageigol dunga chu athekhum dingu ahi.
Chujou tengleh aman asempan ding, aluchang jong athao jong alhe khena, chule maicham chunga mei kitih chunga thing lom chunga chu thempu pan agol gola a set khum ding ahi;

asungsa jouse leh akeng chengse vang chu aman twiya asop ngimsel ding ahi. Chutah le thempu pan atahsa ijakai aboncha apumpia chu maicham chunga pumgo thilto dinga atodoh ding; hichu pumgo thilto hiya, meiya kigouvam thilto hi ding, Pakai dinga jong agim nam tuitah hiding ahiye.
Aman Pakaiya pumgo thilto apeh ding chu vachate lah a kona atodoh ding ahileh vakhu hijongle vapal nou hijongle atothei ding ahi;
avacha chu thempu pan maicham phunga ahinchoi lut ding, aluchang ahetanpeh ding, chuta chu maicham chunga chu agovam ding ahin, athisan chu maicham vela chu kilhoh lha ding ahiye.
Chule aman achang-oi chu amul puma akho lhah a maicham vel niso lam vutvam kikholna laiya chu ase lhah ding ahin;

chutengle vacha chu alha langto abokhen ding, hevang ahe lhah pai hel lou ding, chujou tengle vacha chu thempupan maicham chunga thing kitih chunga chu agovam ding, hita chu hiche jong chu meiya kigouvam pumgo thilto hiya, Pakai dinga agim nam tuitah hi ding ahiye.
Mikhat touvin Pakai henga lhosoh thil atonoma ahileh athilto ding chu suhlou chang bong neldi set hiya, hiche chu athiltoh pan thaotwi achap khuma gimnamtui toh ahal ding,

chutengle athilto chu Aaron chapate thempuho henga ahinchoi ding ahi; chujongle aman athilto suhlou chang bong neldi sel thaotwi toh kihalsa, gimnamtui toh kihalsa chu khut dim khat akihamdoh kit ding, hichele chun thempupan maicham chunga thilto chu melchih jing dinga meiya agovam ding, hita chu hiche chu meiya kigouvam thilto hiya, Pakai dinga jong agimnam tuitah hi ding ahiye.
Chutengle lhosoh thilto avaldoh chengse chu ipi hijongle Aaron le achapate chan ding ahin; hiche hi Pakaiya pumgo thilto kitohdoh lah a chu atheng chung nung laitah ahi.

“Nangman lhosoh thilto dinga changbong neldisel meilhum sunga kikangsa nahinchoi tengleh, hiche suhlou changlhah alhon lhona kisem chu chang bong neldisela kona kisem cholsolou thao toh kihalsa hi ding, ahilou jongle changlhah abem pilpela kisem cholsolou thao toh kihalsa ma ma hi ding ahiye.
Chule nalhosoh thilto ding chu khangbela kikangsa ahileh, nathilto chu suhlou changbong neldi sel hitin, thaoto kihalsa hi ding;
nangman hiche chu nahebal bala thaotwi nalhit khum ding, hita chu hiche chu lhosoh thiltoa kimang ding ahiye.
Nangma lhosoh thilto ding chu khangbela kikangsa ahile, athilto chu suhlou, changbong neldi sel thaoto kimeh halsa hiding ahiye.
Hitobanga kigongsa thilto ding chu nangman Pakai henga nahin choi ding ahin, hiche thilto chu them pupa akipeh tengleh aman maicham phunga apoh lut ding ahitai.
Chutengle thempupan lhosoh thilto lah a kona chu amangmo laitah chu alah doh a, maicham chunga chu meiya agovam ding ahin, hiche chu govam thilto hiya Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hi ding ahiye.
Hiche lhosoh thilto amoh chengse chu Aaron le achapate chang ding ahiuvin, hiche chu Pakaiya pumgo thilto kitoh doh lah a chu atheng chung nung pen hi ding ahi.

“Nang hon Pakai henga nahin choiyu lhosoh thilto khat a khat cha jong chol kisothei louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu cholsosa thil leh khoiju hi itih chan hijongle nang hon Pakai henga pomgo thilto dinga nago thei lou diu ahi.
Lhosoh ga masa ahi, tia vang Pakai henga thilto dinga nahin choilut theiyu ahinan, hijongle hiche tobang thilto ho chu agimnam tuitah hisah dinga maicham chunga vang nato thei lou diu ahiye.

Nangman nalhosoh thilto ding jouse chu aboncha chi naso cheh ding ahin; hita chu nalhosoh thilto jouse chu ipi hijongle na-Pathen to nakitepna chi chu solouva nakoi thei louhel ding ahi; hitobanga chu nathilto jouse chu aboncha chi naso cheh ding ahiye.
“Nangman Pakaiya lhosoh ga masa thilto nato ding leh, hiche lhosoh ga masa thilto dinga chu changkung thah mong monga ki-at tilcha hiya, hiche chu meiya kihulgo hi ding dol ahi.
Hiche thilto lah a chu thaotwi nasun khuma, alah a chu gimnamtui jong nahal ding, hiteng chuleh hiche chu lhosoh thilto hi ding ahitai.
Chutengle thempupan athilto mangmo laitah changlhah a kisemsa chu thao le gimnamtui chutoh agovam tha jeng ding ahin; hiche thilto chu Pakaiya meiya govam thilto hi ding ahiye.

“Mi khat touvin chamna thilto kilhaina gantha abola, hiche dinga chu bong khat to ding agot’a ahileh, ato ding chu bongchal hihen lang anu hijongle nolnabei hi ding, hitobang chu Pakai angsunga ato ding bou ahi.

Aman agancha todoh luchanga chu akhut angap’a, chule kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu atha ding ahi; chujou leh Aaron chapate thempuho chun athisan chu maicham mai ageigola athe natsoh hel diu ahiye.
Hiche kilhaina gan kithat chamna thilto, Pakai henga pumgo thiltoa kitohsa chu aman asung panlam jouse leh asung thao jouse, chule asunga agila beh athao jouse jong,
akal teni le achung lhona beh athao chengse ahin, ataigui teni chunga beh athao ho ahin, athin chung dunga beh athao ho leh akal tenia beh athao jouse chu atodoh ding ahiye.

Chutah le Aaron chapaten hiche thilto jong chu maicham chunga thinglom chunga kikoisa pumgo thilto chutoh agovam tha dingu ahitai; hita chu hiche hi meiya kigouvam Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah thilto hi ding ahiye.
“Athilto ding kilhaina gantha chamna thilto Pakai dinga atodoh ding chu kelcha khat tou ahikhah a ahileh, kelchal hihen lang kelpi hijongle nolnabei khat atodoh ding ahi.
Kelngoi atodoh ding ahijongle, hiche jong chu Pakai angsunga ato ding;
akelngoi todoh luchanga chu akhut angap’a, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu atha ding ahi; chujou le Aaron chapaten athisan chu maicham mai ageigola athe khum soh hel diu ahi.

Hita chu aman hiche kilhaina gantha chamna thiltoa kona asathao chengse, asung thao ho ahin, ameikunga pat’a athao aboncha, asunga agil thao chengse toh, asunga um athao ijakai aboncha chu Pakai henga pumgo thilto dinga apeh ding,
akal teni le achung lhona beh athao chengse toh, ataigui teni chunga athao chengse ahin, chule athin le akal teni chunga athao behse se jong chu akhodoh a pumgo thilto dinga chu apansah tha ding ahi.
Chujou teng leh thempupan hichengse chu maicham chunga an neh thilto meiya govam thilto dinga Pakai henga atodoh ding ahiye.
“Amapa thilto ding chu kelcha ahijong leh, hiche jong chu Pakai angsung ma ma a ato ding ahin,
akelcha todoh luchanga chu akhut angap’a, kikhopna ponbuh maiya chu atha ding, chule athisan chu Aaron chapaten maicham mai ageigola athe khum dingu ahi.
Chujou teng leh aman akelcha todoh chu Pakai henga govam thilto dinga hicheng hi atodoh ding ahi: agil tom athao jouse ahin, chule agila beh athao jouse toh,
akal teni le achung lhona beh athaose se toh, ataigui teni chunga athao chengse toh, chule athin le akal tenia kona jong aphe jouse akhodoh tha ding ahiye.
Hichengse chu thempupan maicham chunga meiya govam an neh thilto dinga ato ding, agimnam tuitah a kitungdoh ding ahi. Sathao jouse chu Pakaiya ahijinge.
Hiche hi nakhang nakhanguva chonna dan a nanei diu, hoi koma cheng jeng jong leu chun sathao le thisan naneh louhel dingu ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chatejah a seipeh in lang hitin tin; ‘Mihing khat tou achonset a Pakaiyin bol lou dinga thu apehsa chu hetoh louva abol khah tah a hitobang thil khat chu abol doh tah a ahileh;

hitobang thil bol kha a chu thao nusa thempu ahikhah a ama chu achonset a chujeh a chu mipi chunga themmona alhut khum jeng tah a ahileh, them pupa chun hiche chonset aboldoh jeh a chu chonset thoina dinga bong hon lah a kona nolnabei bongchal gol khat Pakai henga ato ding ahi.
Thempupa achonsepa chun bongchal chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbul Pakai angsunga ahinkai lut ding, chutengle bongchal luchanga chu akhut angap’a hita chu Pakai angsunga bongchal chu atha ding ahi.
Chule thao nusa thempu chonse pa chun bongchal thisan them khat chu asodoh a hiche thisan chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga ahinchoi lut ding ahi.
Chutengle thempupan thisau chu akhut junga akhoiya muntheng kidal khum pondal mai Pakai angsunga chu sagi veijen thisan chu athe khum khum jeng ding ahi.

Chuta chu thempupan kikhopna ponbuh sunga kitung, gimnamtui lhutna maicham selki li Pakai angsunga um ho chunga chu athisan phabep chu aloinat cheh ding, bongchal thisan amoh chengse vang chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula kitung pumgo thilto govamna maicham khom phung dunga chu asun lhah ding ahiye.
Chule chonset thoina thilto bongchal thao ho chu aboncha alip lhahsoh hel ding, asung gil jouse toma athao ho hihen lang agil thao jouse hijongle,
akal teni le achung lhona beh athao chengse toh ataigui teni chunga behse se toh, athaoto kihal athina beh ho leh akal tenia kona chu akhodoh soh hel ding ahin;
hita chu chamna thilto kilhaina gantha bongchala kona kiladoh bang banga chu abol ding, chujou tengleh thempupan aboncha chu pumgo thilto kigona maicham chunga agovam ding ahi.
Ahin bongchal vun ahin, atahsa ahin apumpia chu aluchang pum, akeng li pum, asung gil chengse toh, a-ehjouse toh,
bongchal pumpi chu ngahmun polam vutbouva muntheng lai khat a apoh doh peh ding, hikoma chu thing atia meiya agagovam hel ding; hitobanga chu vut kisun lhahna vutbouva chu agagovam heI ding ahitai.

“Israel khoppi pumpi chu hetoh louva achonset tah uva, hitobang chonset kibol chu khoppi pumpi hetdoh theiya a um tah hih hel jenga, amahon la Pakaiyin bol louhel dinga athupehsa khat pen pen chu aboldoh jeng tah uva, hijeh a chu themmo achanlo helu ahitah leh,

itih hijongle hitobang chonset chu ahung kihetdoh tih tih chuleh khoppi pumpin chonset thoina ding bongchal gol khat chonset thilto dinga ato diu, abongchal chu kikhopna ponbuh maiya ahinkai lut dingu ahi;
chutengle khoppi loi upa chengse chun Pakai angsunga hiche bongchal luchanga chu akhut’u angap cheh uva, hichele chun abongchal chu Pakai angsunga kithat ding ahiye.
Chule thao nusa thempupan bongchal thisan chu them khat kikhopna ponbuh sunga ahinchoi lut ding,
hichele chun thempupan akhut jung athisan lah a chu adekot’a pondal maiya chu Pakai angsung tah a sagi veijen athisan chu athe khum khum jeng ding ahi.

Chujongle kikhopna ponbuh sunga kitung Pakai angsunga kido maicham saki li chunga jong chu athisan them khat cheh aloinat ding ahi; thisan amoh chengse vang chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula pumgo thilto govamna maicham khombul dunga chu asun lhah soh hel ding ahiye.
Chule bongchal thaolai jouse chu alip doh soh hel ding aboncha chu maicham chunga alhut vam hel ding ahi.
Hiche jong hi chonset thilto bongchal kibolna bang banga chu kibol ding ahi; hita chu thempupan mipi athoi teng leh abonchauva ngaidam chang ding ahiuve.
Chule chonset thilto bongchal kibolna bang banga chu thempupan abongchal chu ngahmun polama apoh manga agagovam ding ahi; hiche hi khoppi pumpi chonset thoina chonset thilto ahiye.
“Gam vaipo khat tou achonset tah a hetoh louhela Pakai a-Pathenin bol louhel dinga athupehsa khat tou abol khah tah a, hijeh a chu themmo achan tah leh,
ama chonsetna chu ama hengma ma akihetsah tih tih chuleh aman jong achonset thilto dinga chu nolnabei kelchal khat ahinkaiya,
hiche kelchal luchanga chu akhut angap’a, mihon Pakai angsunga pumgo thilto gancha atha nau mun ma ma a chu kelchal chu atha ding ahi; hiche hi chonset thilto ahiye.

Chujou tengleh thempupan hiche chonset thilto kelchal thisan chu akhut junga them khat adekot ding, chule pumgo thilto kigona maicham saki li chunga chu aloinat soh hel ding, amoh cheng kelchal thisan se se chu pumgo thilto govamna maicham khombul dunga chu asun lhah soh ding ahi.

Chujou tengleh asathao chengse chu chamna thilto kilhaina gantha sathao kibolna bang banga chu aboncha maicham chunga alhutvam soh hel ding ahi; hita chu thempupan hiche gam vaipopa, chonsetna chu athoipeh ding, chutah leh ama chu ki ngaidam ding ahiye.
“Mipi lah a milham khat tou hetoh louva achonset a Pakaiyin bol dinga aphal lou thupeh ho khat tou abol khah tah a, hijeh a chu themmo achan khah a ahileh,
achonsetna chu ama akihetdoh sah tih tih a chu aman jong achonset thilto dinga kelpi nolnabei khat ahinkai ding ahi.
Achonsepa chun achonset thilto kelpi luchanga chu akhut angap’a, pumgo thilto kithana mun ma ma a chu kelpi chu atha ding;

chutengle thempupan kelpi thisan them khat chu akhut junga adekot’a pumgo thilto maicham saki li chunga chu aloinat soh hel ding, chule athisan amoh chengse vang chu maicham khombul dunga chu asun lhah ding ahiye.

Chujongle chamna thilto gantha athao jouse akilah doh banga chu hiche kelpi sathao jouse jong kiladoh soh kei ding, athaose se chu thempupan Pakai jah dinga agimnam tuitah ahina dinga maicham chunga alhutvam hel ding ahi; hita chu thempupan amapa chu athoi ding, chutengleh ama chu ki ngaidam ding ahi.
“Chonsepa chun achonset thilto dinga chu kelngoi ahinkaiya ahileh, kelngoi jong chu api hiya nolnabei hel hi ding,
hiche chonset thilto kelngoipi luchanga chu akhut angap’a min pumgo thilto gan atha nau muna chu chonset thilto dinga atha ding ahi.

Chule thempupan hiche chonset thilto thisan chu akhut junga them khat adekot’a pumgo thilto maicham saki li chunga chu aloinat soh hel ding, athisan amoh chengse vang chu maicham khombul dunga chu asun lhah ding ahitai.

Chamna thilto kilhaina gantha kelngoi thao jouse alip doh banguva, aman hiche kelngoipi chu athaolai jouse alip doh peh ding, Pakai henga govam thilto kigona ji maicham chunga chu thempupan athao chu agovam ding ahi; hita chu thempupan achonsepa chonset chu athoipeh ding ahin, hiteng chuleh ama ki ngaidam ding ahiye.

Mihing khat tou chu chonse tahen lang, hichea chun aman masanga thil kibol kihahselna ham khat anamua ahiloule athudol chu anahet toh ham jeh in athu hettohsah dingin hung kipan tahen lang, ahinla athudol chu seidoh louvin umden jeng ta leh, aman themmona akiboldoh ahitan, athemmona chu ama ma man akipoh den ding ahi.

Ahilou jongleh mihing khat chun thil thenglou aboh khat tou tongkha hen, hiche chu saboh atheng lou thilong ham ahiloule gamsa thenglou thilong ham hihen, insa thenglou ahon hona kijot loi thilong ham atoh khah a aman hedoh louva aboh a aumdoh tah a ahileh, ama chu aboh a um jeng ding ahitai.

Ahilou jongleh itobang ham khat jeh a kisubohsa mihem aboh athenglou khat tou atoh khah a, amanla hedoh louhela anauma hileh, hiche atoh khah chu ahetdoh phat phat chuleh ama chu aboh athenglouva um jeng ding ahi.

Ahilouva mihing khat tou man akamsunga kona thilse bolna ding hihen lang thilpha bolna ding hijongle geltoh louhela kihahselna thusei ngei mo tah anapotdoh sah a, hitobang asei chu aman asuhmil hel jeng tah a, chujou tengleh hitobang asei chu ahetdoh kit’a ahileh, ahetdoh doh a kona chu hiche thilse ho anasei jeh a chu ama themmo chang ding ahi.
Hiche ho khat pen pena hi mihem khat themmo achan khah tah a ahileh aman themmo achanna chonset chu aphondoh ding,

chule aman achonset jeh a chu athemmo channa thilto ding chu Pakai henga ahinkai ding, kel hon lah a kona kelngoi hihen lang kelcha hijongleh api hi ding, hiche chu chonset thiltoa kisim ding ahi; chutengle thempupan achonset jeh a chu amapa dinga thoimatna asempeh ding ahi.

“Ijemtia achonsepa chun kelngoi atodoh jou louva ahijongle achonset a athemmo channa thilto dinga chu Pakai henga dinga vakhu nou ni ham, ahiloule vapalnou ni ham ahinchoiya khat chu chonset thiltoa manchah ding chule khatjoh jong chu pumgo thiltoa pansah ding ahi.
Aman vacha teni chu thempupa henga ahinchoiya, thempupan vacha khatjo chu chonset thilto dinga atodoh masah ding, vacha chu alol chang ahechip peh a aluchang vang chu ahe-lhah pai lou ding ahi;
hita chu maicham kimvela chu chonset thilto vacha thisan chu them khat athin khuma, athisan amoh chengse vang chu maicham khombul dunga chu alhoh lhah peh ding ahi; hiche hi chonset thilto chu ahiye.

Chujou tengle abana vacha khatma chu adan kisemsa dungjuiya pumgo thilto dinga atodoh ding ahin; thempupan jong achonsepa chun chonset anabolsa ahijeh a chu thoimatna abolpeh ding, chutengle a mapa chu ngaidam chang ding ahiye.

“Hichea jong chu achonsepan vakhu nou ni chuham, vapalnou ni chuham, khatcha beh jeng jong chu ato lel nah laiya ahileh, hiche achonset jeh a achonset thilto dinga chu chang bong neldi sel phatah a kisemsa ephah dim khat hopsoma hop khat ahinchoi ding ahi; ahin hiche chang bong neldi sel chunga chu thaotwi jong asun khum louhel ding, gimnamtui jong achohal louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi chon set thilto ahibouve.

Hiche athilto ding chu aman thempupa henga ahinchoiya, thempupan amangmo dinga chang bong lah a kona chu khut dim khat ahamdoh a, hicheng chu Pakai henga govam thilto kihalna maicham chunga chu agovam ding ahi; hiche jong hi chonset thilto ma ma ahiye.

Hita hi thempupan hitobang thilboh lah a khat tou khat anabol kha a chonsepa dinga chu kithoina asempeh ding, chutengle amapa chu ki ngaidam ding ahi. Hiche thiltona a avaldoh amoh chengse vang chu lhosoh thilto kibolna bang banga thempupa chang ding ahitai,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Mihing khat touvin tahsan asuh keh a thilse abol khah a, hetoh louhela Pakai dinga thil theng ho khat tou asuhset’a chonset abol khah tah a ahileh, aman Pakai henga hiche athemmo thilto dinga chu kelngoi hon lah a kona kelngoi chal khat agakaiya, hiche chu nolnabei hi ding, nangman aman jat ding chu munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya dangka shekel natepeh ding ahi; hiche hi themmona thilto ahiye.

A man thil theng asuhset jeh a chu ipi thil theng anahi jeng tajongle, semphatna abol a, athilto chu aman kitep jat a chu ajat nga jen agop be kit ding, chutengle them pupa agapeh ding ahi; hita chu thempupan hiche themmo jeh a thilto kelngoi chal a chu amapa dinga thoimatna asempeh ding, chutengle ama ki ngaidam ding ahiye.

Mihing khat tou man Pakaiyin bol louhel dinga aseisa thil khat pen pen abol khah a, hita chu chonset abol tah a ahileh, aman athilbol chu hedoh hih hel jong leh ama chu themmo chang ahitan, athemmona chu akipoh ding ahitai.

Hiche chonsepa chun kel hon lah a kona nolnabei kelngoi chal khat aga kimat’a thempupa henga ahinkai ding, nangman hiche themmona thilto dinga amanjat ding natep peh a, chutengle aman hetoh louhela thil anabol khel jeh a chu thempupan ama dinga thoimatna abolpeh ding, hita chu ama ngaidam chang ding ahi.
Hiche hi themmona thilto ahin; mihempa chu Pakai angsunga themmo changsa ahitai,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Mihing khat tou achonset’a Pakai douna a tahsan asuh keh a, a sum kikoi thudol ham, kisel tup thudol ham khat’a aheng akom ajou lhep a ahiloule achomgam jenga, ahilou jangle aheng akom chu abol gentheiya,
ahitah hih jongle athil mansah khat tou amudoh peh a ahivanga athilmu chung changa chu ajou aseiya, jouthua akihahsela, hita chu mihem chonsetna theidol thil khat touva chu chonset abol khah tah a,

hitobanga chu mihem khat tou chun chonsetna aneiya themmo achantah a ahileh, ama chun aheng akom achomna jat-thil chu alepeh kit ding, ahilouva pumhatsana alah ahijongle alepeh ding, ama kikoisah sum ahijong leh asum chu alepeh ding, thil kimansah ahiya amudoh kit ahijongle alepeh ding ahi;

ahilouva aman jouva anakihahselna thil hijongle alepeh cheh ding, hita chu aman athil jat chu lhingsela alepeh a, ajat nga jat’a abepeh ding, themmo thilto abol nikho chuleh athil neipa chu lhingset’a apeh be ding chutoh apeh tha ding ahiye.
Athemmopa chun kelngoi hon lah a kona kelngoi chal agakaiya nangman themmo thiltoa sanpeh thei dola aman natuhsa nolnabei chu Pakaiya todoh dinga thempupa henga ahinkai lut ding ahi;
hiteng chuleh thempupan Pakai angsunga amapa chu athoi ding, hichea kona chu mihem khat’in agabol khah a themmo achanna theiya thil chengsea kona chu ama ngaidam chang ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Aaron le achapate chu thu pen lang hitin seiyin, ‘Hiche hi pumgo thilto kitodoh dan ahi. Pumgo thilto chu jan khovah hel jingkah geiya maicham chung meilhuma chu kijam khovah den ding, maicham phung mei jong chu kou khovah hel ding ahi.
Thempupan akivonna naltah chu akivona, atoka chol naltah jong chu akichen ding, chule maicham chunga pumgo thilto kigovamna meivam jouse chu alodoh a aboncha chu maicham koma chu asun lhah ding ahi.
Chujou tengleh thempupan avon jouse asutlhah a, von chom dang joh akivon a, vutvam jouse chu ngahmun polam muntheng lai khat’a apohdoh ding ahi.

Maicham chunga meikong chu kong jing jenga mit louhel ding; jingkah sim jingkah seh le thempupan maicham chunga thing atibe jing ding, achunga chu pumgo thilto chu ajamtoh a, hita chu thing chunga chu chamna thilto gantha sathao jouse chu alhut vam ding ahi.
Tantih nei louhela maicham chunga chu mei kong jing jeng ding, mit louhela kong kong ding ahi.
“Hiche hi lhosoh thilto dan ahi. Aaron chapaten thilto chu maicham maiya Pakai angsunga ahinto diu ahin;

amaho lah a mi khat’in athilto lah a kona chu hiche lhosoh thilto chang bong neldi sellah a kona, khut dim khat ahamdoh a, lhosoh thilto chutoh kihalsa thaotwi le gimnamtui pum puma chu alah tha a, hiche chu amangmo dinga maicham chunga chu agovam ding Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hi ding ahiye.

Chutengle amoh cheng avaldoh chengse chu Aaron le achapaten aneh diu ahitai; aneh tenguleh cholsolouva aneh uva muntheng lai khat’a aganeh dingu ahiye; anehna dingu mun chu kikhopna panbuh palsunga aneh diu ahi.

Changlhah a neh dia akikan tengu leh chol asolou diu, hiche hi keiman keima dinga govam thilto kibol lah a kachan kahop peh ahibouvui; chonset thilto le themmona thilto tobang banga hiche jong hi atheng chung nung ahiye.

Pakaiya kona govam thilto chung chang thudola nakhang khanguva dinga thu kitep peh banga chu, hiche hi Aaron chate lah a pasal tapouvin aneh thei cheh diu ahi; hiche thilto chengse hi mihem atongkha a aum jongle theng jeng ding ahi,” a tin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:

“Aaron le achapaten thempua pang dinga thao akinu niu leh Pakai henga ato dingu thilto chu hiche hi hi ding ahi: lhosoh thiltoa pang dinga chang bong neldi sel ephah dim khat hopsoma hop khat hi ding, akeh lang khat chu jingkah teng atoa chule akeh lang khatma chu nilhah tengleh ato ding ahi.

Achang bong neldi sel chu khangbel sung khat’a thaotwi toh kichoh hal ding, chujou tengle nangman mindep’a kihalsa chu lhosoh thilto dang kibolna bang banga apheng phenga nakan ding, Pakai henga gimnam tuitah hi dinga nahinchoiya nato ding ahiye.
Aaron chapate lah a Aaron khela thempua pang dinga thao kinupa chun hiche thilto chu aitih geiya dia kitepna banga chu Pakai henga atodoh ding, aboncha chu kigouvam hel ding ahiye.
Thempu khat’in lhosoh thilto atodoh chan chu aboncha govam jeng ding ahin, koiman aneh thei louhel ding ahiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Aaron le achapate jah a seipeh in lang hitin tin, ‘Hiche hi chonset jala thilto tona dola dan ahi. Pumgo thilto gancha kithana mun ma ma a chu Pakai angsung laitah a chonset thiltoa kitoh doh gancha jong chu tha ding ahi; hiche hi thilto theng chung nung pen ahiye.
Chonset a thilto toh doh a pang thempupa chun asa jong chu aneh ding, kikhopna ponbuh palsung muntheng lai khat’a aneh ding ahi.

Itobang thil hijongle hiche thiltoa kitoh sa tongkha chan chu theng jeng ding ahi; athisan jeng jong ponsil chung dung khat’a anat khah a ahile hiche thisan natna ponsil chu nangman muntheng laiya nasop lhah ding ahina laiye.
Chujongle asa kihonna leibel jong chu kivokeh hel jeng ding ahi; sum-eng bela kihon ahitah jong leh hetngim sel a twiya de-lhah ding ahiye.
Hitobang thilto sa chu thempuho lah a pasala kaiyin aneh thei cheh diu ahi; hiche chu atheng chung nung pen ahitai.

Amavang muntheng phunga kithoina dinga athisan puma hung kipolutsa kikhopna ponbuh sung hung kilhutsa chonset thiltoa kithat sa vang chu koimachan aneh thei louhel ding, asa chu meiya govam jeng ding ahi.
“Themmo jala thilto ding dan chu hiche hi ahi. Athil kitoh chu thil theng chung nung ahin;
pumgo thilto gancha kithana mun ma ma a chu hiche themmo jala thilto gancha jong chu atha diu, chule athisan chu maicham chung ageigola chu kithe khum ding ahi.
Chujou tengle aman athao lai jouse chu aboncha atodoh ding ahi: amei thaolai, asung tom athao chengse toh,
ataiguiya um akal teni le achung lhona beh athao chengse chutoh, chule athin le akal teni chunga beh aphe le athao kihal chengse jong chu akhodoh tha dim dem ding ahi.
Hicheng chu thempupan Pakai henga govam thiltoa pang dinga maicham chunga chu agovam ding ahi; hiche hi themmona thilto ahiye.
Hiche thilto sa chu thempuho lah a pasal jousen aneh thei cheh diu ahi; muntheng lai khat’a asa chu neh ding ahiye; hiche jong hi atheng chung nungma ahi.
Themmona thilto jong hi chonset thilto tobang bang ahin, anigel lhona ding hi dan khatseh seh ahibouve; athoiya pang them pupa chun amapa kithoina thilto chu akilah ding ahi.
Pumgo thilto ding toh ho thilto toh doh a pang thempupa chun hiche athilto pumgo thilto savun chu akilah ding ama chang tei tei ding ahi.
Chujongle lhosoh thilto, meilhuma kigousa, khangbela kikangsa chule khangbela kihonsa jouse chu aboncha athil toh doh a pang thempupa chang ding ahi.
Chutobangma a chu lhosoh thilto thaotwi kichap kotsa hihen lang aguma um nalai hijongleh, khatjoh chu hihen achom dang khat chu hijong leh, aboncha chu Aaron chapate chang ding ahiuve.
“Hiche hi mihem khat touvin Pakai henga atonom chamna thilto kilhaina gantha kibol ding dan ahi.

Athil tohpan thangvah thilto dinga atonom ahileh, hiche athangvah thilto ding chu thaotwi chapkotsa changlhah lhon toh, thaotwi kivat khumsa changlhah pheng abempil pel toh, thaotwi toh kihalsa changlhah pheng chang bong neldi sela kisem toh atotha ding ahi.
Aman athangvahna ding chu chamna thilto kilhaina gantha chu cholsolou changlhah toh ahinto doh tha ding ahi.

Chutengle hitobang thilto lah a kona chu aman thilto jousea kona chu khat cheh alah doh a, Pakai dinga thilto dia apeh ding ahi; hicheng chu chamna thilto gancha thisan jouse thethanglea pang thempupa chu chang ding ahi.
Chujongle a mapa thangvahna dinga chamna thilto kilhaina gantha chu atodoh nikho ma ma a asa neh jou ding ahin; asa ahalsi jeng cha jong jingkah geiya akhovah sah louhel ding ahi.

Ahin amapa thilto kilhaina gantha chu thulhinna kitoh ham ahilou le deichoma kitoh ham ahiya ahileh, aman kilhaina gantha atha nikho leh neh a ajing nikho jongleh amoh avaldoh chengse jong neh kit ding ahinai;
hijongle nithum lhin ni geiya um nalai sa vang chu aboncha meiya govam ding ahitai.

Ijem tia nithum lhin ni chuleh amapa chamna thilto kilhaina gantha chu mi khat touvin asa aneh nah laiya ahileh, thiltoh pa chu kisang thei lou ding ahiye; athilto jong chu ama dinga kinganse peh lou ding ahitai; hitobang chu thet umtah hiya, koi hijongle anekha a aumtah jong leh anekhapa chun athemmona chonset akipoh jeng ding ahi.
“Thilboh athenglou tongkha sa chu neh louhel ding, meiya govam jeng ding ahi. Mihem achung theng chan chun sa aneh thei ding ahi;
amavang ama chung thenglou hela, Pakai henga chamna thilto kilhaina gantha asa nekha chan chu koi hijeng jongleh amite lah a kona paidoh a kikoi ding ahi.

Chule mihem khat touvin thil thenglou khat tongkha hen, hiche athilboh toh khah chu mihem ham, gancha thenglou ham, thil dang thet umtah khat thil ham hihen, hiche atoh khah pum pum chun Pakai henga chamna thilto kilhaina gantha sa ho nekha taleh, hitobang mihing chu amite lah a kona paidoh a um ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh in lang hitin tin, ‘Nanghon sathao pou pou bongchal thao hihen, kelngoi thao hileh, kelcha thao hileh athao lai chu naneh louhel dingu ahi.
Gancha amoh thi athao chu hihen lang, gamsan atha sa thao hijongle athao chu manchah dang danga kimang thei ding ahinan, itin iti jongleh naneh thei louhel dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh koi hijongle Pakai henga govam thiltoa kitoh dohsa gancha sathao nekha tapou chu amite lah a kona paidoh a um ding ahi.
Hiche kalvala jong chu nang hon thisan kiti pou pou, vacha thisan hihen gancha thisan hileh, nachen nauva thisan umpou pou chu naneh thei louhel diu ahi.
Koi koi hijongle thisan nekha tapou mihing chu amite lah a kona paidoh a um jeng ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel chate jah a seipeh in lang hitin tin, ‘Koi hijongle Pakaiya chamna thilto kilhaina gantha toh nom chan in Pakai henga ahinto to jeng ding ahi; aman hitobang chamna thilto kilhaina gantha abolna a kona chu

ama mong mongin akhut tah a Pakaiya govam thilto ding chu ahinkai ding ahi; athil tohpan ato ding chu athao lai le aoplhang ahinchoiya, hita chu Pakai angsunga aoplhang chu thensona thilto dinga kithenso ding ahiye.
Chutengle thempupan athao lai chu maicham chunga alhut vama, chule aoplhang vang chu Aaron le achapate chang ding ahiuve.
Nang hon chamna thilto nabol nauva kona chu samal ajet lam chu thempupa henga thilto ding khat’a napeh dingu ahi;
chule Aaron chapate lah a hiche chamna thilto thisan le athao toh doh a pang thempupa chun ama chan dinga samal ajet lam chu akilah ding ahiye.

ijeh inem itileh keiman hiche akithensosa aoplhang le akitoh dohsa amal chu Israel chate lah a kona kalah doh a, chamna thilto apeh jouseuva kona kakhendoh sa ahitai; hiche ho chu keiman Israel chaten aitih geiya abat jingu ahi, tia thempupa Aaron le achapate kapehsa ahitai.
Hiche hi Aaron le achapate chan ding ahi, tia amaho Pakai thempua pang dinga ahung lut’uva akithenso nikhouva pat’a chu Pakaiya govam thilto jousea kona akilah diuva umsa ahitai.

Amaho thao akinuva thempua pang dinga akigondoh nikhouva pat’a chu hiche hi ama peh ding ahi, tia Pakaiyin Israel chate athupehsa anahi; hiche amahon akhang khanguva tantih nei louhela abat’uva um jing ding ahi,” tin aseiye.
Hiche hi pumgo thilto dan, lhosoh thilto dan, chonset thilto dan, themmona thilto dan, kisuh thengna dan, chamna thilto dan ahin;
Pakaiyin gamthip laiya sinai molsang chunga Mose jah a thu aseiya Israel chaten Pakai henga thilto jouse ahinchoi lut dingu ahi, tia athupeh nikhoa chu anaseisa ahitai.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Aaron le achapate chu abonchauvin puiyin lang, akivon nau chengse, kinu ding thao, choipeh in lang, chonset thilto bongchal le kelngoi chal teni toh kaipeh in, chule cholsolou changlhah pocha dimset chutoh dop than;
chutah le khoppi pumpi chu abonchan kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chun koukhom soh keiyin,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong Pakaiyin athupeh bang bangin aboltai; khoppi pumpia mi jouse chu abonchauvin kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chun ahung kikhom tauve.
Mipi khoppi kikhomho jah a chun Mose’n thu aseiyin, “Hiche hi Pakaiyin bol dinga thu apehsa chu ahitai,” ati.
Chuin Mose’n jong Aaron le achapate chu ahinpuiyin abonchauvin twiyin asil ngimsel soh tai.

Chuti chun Aaron chu sangkhollen a-ah peh in, akonga konggah achenpeh in, sangkhol chol chu a-ah peh in, achunga konggah chu akhaipeh tai: hitobang chun khut themtah a kipheh chal chep konggah chu aveipeh in, akonggah nan amangtan ahi.
Chujouvin ompho chu achunga abeh peh in, ompho chunga chun Urim le Thummim chu akhaipeh in ahi.
Chule aluchanga del akop peh in: chujongle adelkop chung, amasang lama chun sana pheng, lallukhuh theng chu akhaipeh in, Pakaiyin Mose anathupeh bang bangin aboltai.
Mose’n kinu ding thao chu alan, houbuh le asunga thil jouse chu anusoh helin, abonchan athenso tan ahi.

Chujongle thao them khat chu maicham chunga chun sagi veijen athe khum khum jengin, maicham le amanchah athilkeo jouse chu thao anun, ki silna kong le akitunna geiyinjong anusoh keiyin, a bonchan athensotai.
Chujouvin Aaron luchanga chun kinu ding thao chu them khat asun khumin, ama jong chu thao anun, athenson ahi.

Hiti chun Mose’n Aaron chapate chu ahinpuiyin, abonchauvin sangkhol len a-ah peh in, konggah akonguva agah peh cheh in, aluchanguva lukhuh akhuh peh cheh in, Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin abolpeh soh keitan ahi.
Chutah chun chonset thilto bongchal chu ahinkai lut’in Aaron le achapaten chonset thilto bongchal luchanga chun akhut’u angap soh keiyuvin ahi.

Mose’n bongchal chu athat’in, athisan chu akhut jungin adekot in, maicham ning lia saki kisem chengsea chun aloinat cheh in, maicham chu athenson, chujongle athisan chu maicham khombul dunga chun asung lhan, hiti chun athen son, kithoina aboltan ahi.
Chujouvin asunga athao lai jouse aladoh in, athina beh aphe le athao kihal lai le akal teni leh achung lhona beh athao lai jouse a-at lhan, aboncha chun Mose’n maicham chunga chun agouvam heltai.
Ahin bongchal chu avun chengse le atahsa toh, a-eh toh, ngahmun polama Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bangin aga gouvamtan ahi.
Chujouvin pumgo thilto kelngoi chal chu ahinkai lut’in, Aaron le achapaten kelngoi chal luchanga chun akhut’u angam soh hel tauve.
Chuphat’n Mose’n jong kelngoi chal chu athat’in, athisan chu maicham chung ageigola chun athe khumtai.
Chuin kelngoi chal sa chu asemsoh phat’in, Mose’n aluchang le asa kisemtel chutoh chule athaolai chengse chutoh agouvam tan ahi.

Asung jouse le akeng jouse chu twiya akisop ngim soh phat’in Mose’n jong pumgo thiltoa pang din maicham chunga chun kelngoi chal pumpi chu agouvin, Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin Pakai henga govam thilto agimnam tuitah hi dingin aboltai.
A ban kit’a chun thensona kelngoi chal chu ahinkai lut pai kit’in, Aaron le achapaten kelngoi chal luchanga chun akhut’u angam cheh tauve.
Chuin Mose’n kelngoi chal chu athat pai paiyin, athisan them khat chu ahamdoh in, Aaron bilkol jet lam ageiya aloipeh in, akhut jet lam akhutpi le akeng phang jet lam akhopia aloipeh cheh in ahiye.

Hitobangma chun Aaron chapate chu ahinpui lut soh keiyin, Mose’n athisan them khat cheh chu abilkol jet lamu ageigol le akhut jet lamu akhutpi cheh-u toh chule akeng phangu khopi jet lam cheh a chun aloinat peh soh keiyin ahi; chujongle athisan chu Mose’n maicham chung akimvela chun athe khumin ahi.

Chujouvin athao lai jouse toh, amei toh, asunga beh athao lai jouse ahin, athina beh aphe le athao kihal lai le akal teni toh achung thana beh a athao chengse chutoh amal jet lam toh aladoh soh keiyin;

chujongle Pakai angsunga kitung pocha sunga cholsolou changlhah lhon khat thao to kihalsa jong chu alan, changlhah bempil pel khat jong aladoh in, hichengse chu sathao chengse le samal jet lam chunga chun akoisoh keiyin;
chuin hicheng chu Aaron le achapate khut’a ahengin, aboncha chu Pakai angsunga thenso thiltoa nganse dingin athensotai.

Chujouvin Mose’n aboncha chun amaho khut’a konin anung lahpeh soh keiyin, aboncha chun pumgo thilto chutoh maicham chunga alhutvam thatan ahi; hiche hi kithensona thilto ahin, Pakai henga agimnam tuitah hiya govam thilto hijah ahiye.
Hiti chun Mose’n aoplhang chu alan, Pakai angsunga thenso thilto dingin a thenso tan ahi; hiche lai chu Pakaiyin Mose athupeh dungjuiya Mose chan dinga umah ahitai.

Mose’n kinu ding thao them khat chutoh maicham chunga kikoi athisan chutoh alan, Aaron chung, aponsil chung dunga chun a thin khumin, chule achapate chung le achapate ponsil jouse chung dunga chun a thin khumsoh keiyin ahi; hiti chun Aaron chutoh achapate jouse ahiuvin, Aaron jong chu aponsil chengse pumin, achapate jong chu amaho le aponsil jouseu pumin abonchauvin athensotai.

Chujouvin Mose’n jong Aaron le achapate jah a thu aseipeh in, “Kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chun asa hi kihon uvin lang, keiman ‘Aaron le achapaten aneh dingu ahi,’ tia kanaseisa bang chun, kotpi phungbula khun asa le kithensona changlhah pocha sunga kikoi khu meuvin;
chule naneh moh chengseu chu asa hihen changlhah hijongle aboncha meiya nagovam jeng diu ahi.

Chujongle nikho sagi sunga kikhopna kotpi phung nakal lhah louhel diu, nakithenso na diu nikho akichai kahsea napotdoh thei louhel dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nang ho kithensona dinga hi ni sagi lut ding ahi.
Chule tunia kibol bang banga hi Pakaiyin nang ho kithoina bol dinga jong thupeh aneisa ahitai.

Hijeh a chu ni sagi sunga asun ajana kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula nageuva, Pakaiyin nalhah nau chu ipi hijongle nabol bol jeng diu ahi, achutilou le nathi hel dingu ahi; ajeh chu keima jong hita chu thu einakipe ahiye,” ati.
Hijeh chun Aaron le achapaten jong Pakaiyin Mose athupeh jouse chu abonchan abol soh keitauve.
Niget lhin nin Mose’n Aaron le achapate toh chule Israel upate jouse akou khomin;

chuin aman Aaron jah a aseitai, “Chonset thilto dingin bongchal, nou khat gamanin, pumgo thiltoa to dingin kelngoi chat khat ga manin lang, hoijoh chu hijongle nolnabei gel hilhon ding, chule anigel lhon chun Pakai angsunga toh doh temin.
Chujongle Israel chate jah a seipeh in lang hi tin tin, ‘Chonset thilto dingin kelcha achal khat gaman’uvin lang, pumgo thilto dingin nolnabei bongnou khat le kelngoi nou khat gaman’uvin;

chule Pakai angsunga todoh dingin chamna thilto kilhaina gantha dingin bongchal khat le kelngoi chat khat gaman’uvin, lhosoh thilto dingin thaotwi chapkotsa changbong jong gala uvin; ijeh-inem itileh tunia hi nahenguva Pakai hung kilah ding ahi,’ tin seiyin,” ati.

Hijeh chun amahon jong Mose’n asei chengse chu ipi pi hitaleh abonchan kikhopna ponbuh maiya chun ahinpo lut soh tauve; chuin khoppi pumpi chu ahung nailut soh keiyuvin, abonchauvin Pakai angsunga ading soh keitauve.
Hichun Mose’n thu aseiyin, ‘Thil hiche hi Pakaiyin nang ho boldoh dinga thu apeh ahitai, chujongle Pakai loupina chu nang ho henga hung kilah ding ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Mose’n jong Aaron jah a aseiyin, “Maicham phung hin nailut inlang, chonset thilto nato ding leh pumgo thilto nato ding chu hung kiton; chule nangma ding mong mongin jong namite dingin jong kithoina hung bolin; hiti chun mipi thilto chu hinchoiyin lang amaho dingin jong kithoina hung bolpeh in, Pakaiyin athupeh bang chun,” ati.
Hijeh chun Aaronin maicham phung ahin nailut pai paiyin, ama dinga kithoina dinga chonset thilto bongnou chu athat tai.

Chuin Aaron chapaten athisan chu Aaron henga ahin domuvin, aman jong athisan lah chu akhut jungin akhoiyin, chule maicham ning lia saki kisemhoa chun aloinat soh keiye, chujongle athisan amoh chengse chu maicham khombul dunga chun a sung lhatai;
ahin chonset thilto gancha a kon chun athao le akal teni toh, athin a beh aphe le athao kihal lai jouse chu Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin maicham chunga agouvam tan ahi.
Atahsa le avun vang chu Aaronin ngahmun polama meiyin agahal vamtai.
Chujouvin pumgo thiltoa kitoh doh gancha chu athat kit’in, Aaron chapaten athisan chu ama henga ahin domuvin, Aaron chun athisan chu maicham chung ageigol dunga chun athe khum khumin ahi.
Chule achapaten Aaron henga um pumgo thilto sa chu asemtel teluvin aluchang chutoh ahinchoi lut tauve; chuin aman jong aboncha chun maicham chunga agouvam heI tai.
Aaronin asa chu asungse se leh akeng li chu asop ngimselin, aboncha chun pumgo thilto chutoh maicham chunga agouvam tai.

Chujouvin Aaron chun mipi thilto ahinkai lut paiyin, mipi dinga kitoh doh kelcha chonset thilto ding chu amanin, hiti chun athat’in, thilto amasa tobang bang chun, chonset jala thilto ding chun atoh tai.
Chuin pumgo thilto ding jong chu ahinkai lut pai paiyin, adan kisemsa dungjuiyin hiche jong chu atoh doh kit’in ahi.
Chule lhosoh thilto ding jong ahinchoiyin, athilto chu akhut dimset ahamdoh in, jingkah a pumgo thilto kigona ji maicham chunga chun agouvam tai.

Aaronin mipi dinga chamna thilto kilhaina gantha jong chu bongchal jong kelngoi chal jong anin athat pai paiyin ahi; Aaron chapaten athisan chu ama henga ahin domuvin ahileh Aaron in jong hiche thisan chu maicham chung ageigola athe khum khumin,
bongchal le kelngoi chal thao lai jouse, amei thao lai, asung tom athao lai ho toh, akal teni leh athin tom aphe le athao kihalse se chu ahin,
hichengse chu abonchan athao jouse chu aoplhang chunga akoiyuvin, athao chengse vang chu maicham chunga alhut vamhel tauve.
Amavang aoplhangse se leh amal jet lam chu Aaronin Pakai angsunga thenso thiltoa pang ding-in athenson, Mose’n ama athupeh bangin aboltai.

Choujouvin Aaron chun mipi lam asangin amaho chu phatthei aboh tai; hiti chun hicheng thilto atona, chonset thilto le pumgo thilto chule chamna thilto hijatpi agatodoh na a konin ahung kumlha tan ahi.
Hichun Mose le Aaron chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga alut lhontai; chuin ahung potdoh kit lhonin mipi chu phatthei aboh lhonin, chule mipi henga chun Pakai loupina jong ahung kilah pai jengin ahi.

Chutah chun Pakai angsung laitah a mei ahung akongdoh tan, maicham chunga kikoi sathao, pumgo thilto chu akavam hel tai; hichepi chu mipin abonchauva amudoh soh phat’ uvin a-aosot jenguvin, amaiyu tola asulut gamsih seh tauve.

Aaron chapa teni Nadab le Abihu chun ameibom akilah gel lhonin, asunga chun mei atih lhonin, gimnamtui jong akoi lhonin, hiti chun Pakaiyin amani athupeh louhel pi chu abol lhonin, thenglou tah in Pakai angsunga gimnamtui alhut nam lhonin ahi.
Hijeh chun Pakaiya konin meikong ahung koudoh jengin amani akan ahileh Pakai angsung laitah a chu anigel lhonin athidel lhontai.

Hichun Mose’n jong Aaron jah a aseipeh in, “Pakaiyin anasei thu chu hiche hi ahiye, ‘Keima henga hung nailut te henga chu keima tah athenga kakimusah ding, hita chu mitin vaipi angsunga keima choiat’a kaum ding ahi,’ tin anaseiye,” ati. Hichun Aaron chu apaopoh ta hih hele.

Mose’n agangpa Uzziel chapa teni Mishael le Elzaphan chu akouvin ajah lhona thu aseipeh-in, “Hung lut lhonin lang muntheng maiya kon hin nasopi teni lhon long hi podoh lhonin lang ngahmun polama galhut lhontan,” ati.
Hijeh chun amani jong ahung lut lhonin, Mose sei bang chun, along lhon chu asangkhol len lhon chu atomnan amang lhonin ngahmun polama apomang lhontai.

Mose’n Aaron le achapa teni Eleazar le lthamar jah a aseipeh in, “Nang hon nalujang samu alhaiyin pu hih hel uvin, naponsil jouseu jong ehsah hih heluvin, achutiloule nathilo hel theiyu ahin, khoppi pumpi chung jenga jong lungsatna hung chu jeng thei ahi; Pakai lunghanna ahung deujah teng chuleh akap ding chu Israel insung pumpi ahiuve.

Hijeh chun kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula konin potdoh hih heluvin, achutiloule nathilo jeng dingu ahi; ijeh inem itileh nang ho chunga hi Pakai thaonu chu beh jing ahi,” ati. Hichun amahon jong Mose thusei dungjuiyin aboltauve.
Pakaiyin Aaron jah-a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:

“Kikhopna ponbuh sunga nalut tengu leh nangma nahin nachapate ahiuvin ju ham ahiloule khamna thei thil a dang ham don hih heluvin, achutilou le nathilo tei tei dingu ahi; hiche hi nakhang khanguva chonna dana naman jing jeng dingu ahi.
Nang hon thil atheng le tang gol a kimang jong nasekhen uva, aboh le angim jeng jong nadat khen cheh diu ahi;
hita chu Israel chate hi Pakaiyin amaho dinga Mose jah a thu ahinsei jouse chonna dan chengse chu aboncha nahilsoh kei dingu ahi,” tin aseiye.

Mose’n Aaron le ahing nalai achapa teni Eleazar le Ithamar jah-a thu aseiyin, “Pakai henga govam thilto lah a avaldoh lhosoh thilto chu lauvin lang cholsolouvin maicham koma chun neuvin; ijeh inem itileh hiche hi thil theng chung nung pen ahiye:

nang hon hiche hi muntheng lai khat’a naneh dingu ahi; ajeh pentah chu hiche hi Pakai henga govam thilto lah a kona kiladoh nang hole nachapateu ding mong monga umah ahi: ajeh chu hita chu keima thu eikipeah ahiye.

Akithensosa aoplhang le akitoh dohsa amal vang chu nang ho nahiuvin nachapateu ahin, chule nachanute jouseu ahin, muntheng lai khat’a naneh cheh dingu ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh hichengse chu Israel chate chamna thilto kilhaina gantha a kona nang hole nachapateu ding mong monga kipedohsa ahitai.

“Todohsa amal leh thensosa aoplhang chu amahon ahinchoiyuva, govam thilto sathao chutoh ahinpoh lut tha diu, hichu Pakai angsunga thenso thiltoa pang dinga kithenso ding ahi; chutengle athil kitohdoh chu nang ho le nachapateu nachansoh kei diu, atonsot geiya hita chu um jing ding ahi: Pakai thupeh bang banga chu kibol ding ahiye,” ati.

Chujouvin Mose’n jong chonset thilto kelcha chung chang thudol chu phate chan akhol toh dim demin ahileh, vetan, kelcha chu anagouvam tauve! Chuphat’in Mose jong Aaron chapa teni ahing nalai teni Eleazar leh lthamar chunga alung hang pai jengin aseiyin hitin ati,

“Ipi ding pentah a nang nin chonset thilto chu muntheng lai khat’a naneh da lhon ham? Ajeh chu hiche thil theng chung nung pen ahin, nang ni nakipe lhona, Pakai angsunga mipi thoi damna nabol lhona hita chu khoppi pumpi themmona chu napoh lhon dinga kiti hilou ham?
Ven, athisan chu muntheng indan sungnung lama ahung kipolut tapoi. Keiman kathupeh bang banga chu nang nin muntheng laiya chu naneh mong mong lhon ding hijah ahiye,” ati.

Hichun Aaronin jong Mose jah a aseiyin, “Vetan, tunin amani hin chonset jala athilto lhon ding le pumgo thilto ato lhon ding chu Pakai angsunga ahung tohdoh lhontai; ahinla thil hi abang bang ahi nalaiyin, keima eiki ngoh lo bep seuvin ahitai! Tunia chu keiman chonset thilto sa chu kaneh hita leh Pakai mitmua kisang thei jeng ding hilou ham?” ati.
Mose’n hiche asei chu ajah phat chun a lung adam bepseuve.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu aseiyin ajah lhona chun hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh lhonin lang ajah uva hitin ti lhonin, “Leiset chunga lha le gancha jouse lah a nang hon hiche ho hi naneh thei dingu ganhing ho chu ahiuve.
Ipi gancha hileh atin kika a, tin ni neiya, anehsa ihdoh kit’a lhai lhaiji chengse chu gancha lah a naneh thei dingu ahi.

Ahinla anehsa ihdoh kit’a lhai lhaiji, atin kika ho lah jenga jong hichengse hi naneh thei lou diu ahi: sangong sang hi naneh thei lou diu ahi, nang ho dinga satheng ahipoi, ajeh chu anehsa a-ihdoh kit’a alhai lhai nah vangin atin akika hih-e.
Jupi jong hi nang ho dinga aboh ahiye, ajeh chu anehsa aihdoh kit’a alhai lhai nah vangin atin akika poi.
Talep jong hi nang ho dinga athenglou ahi, ijeh-inem itileh anehsa aihdoh kit’a alhai lhai nah vangin ama jong hi a tin akika pon ahi.
Chule nangho dinga vohcha jong hi aboh ahiye; ajeh chu atin akikat’a atin ni anei jeng vangin, anehsa aihdoh kit pon, alhai khapoi.
Hicheng hi asau jong naneh lou diu, alongu jong natoh khah louhel dingu ahi; hicheng hi nang ho dinga aboh ahibouvui.
“Twi lah-a cheng ho lah-a hicheng hi naneh thei diu ahi. Twikhanglena cheng hihen lang vadunga cheng hijongle aving le alip nei tapou chu ipi hijongle naneh thei dingu ahinai.

Amavang Twikhanglen dunga cheng hihen lang vadung tina cheng hijongleh, twi lah a ahon hona kiloiya vah le ganhing ho hihen twi lah a hing thei ganhing ho hijongleh, aving neilou leh lip bei jouse chu nang ho dinga thet umtah hijah ahiuve.
Hichengse chu nang hon thet umtah-a nagel jing diu, asau jong naneh louhel dingu ahin, chule athilongu jong natoh khah thei louhel diu ahiye.
Twi lah-a cheng aving le alip bei tapou chu nang ho dinga thet umtah ganhing jeng ahiuve.
“Chule vachate lah-a nang hon thet uma nagel diu chu hicheng hi ahi, hichengse hi asau jong naneh thei louhel diu, nathet jing jeng dingu ahi: muvanlai ahin, muthong ahin, chule mu-ngagal ahin,
mu kitipou pou ahin, itobang hijongle mubong pou pou ahin,
itobang hijongle va-ah pou pou jong ahin,
vangongsang jong ahin, vabah ahin, twivakhu ahin, itobang hijongle muvanlai lhem jouse ahin,
simbu ahin, vatotmuhkon ahin, twi-vahong ahin,
twiah ahin, vatotkamkabah ahin, muthong ahin,
twilungva ahin, itobang hijongle twivakang pou pou ahin, sel-ehva ahin chule bah jong ahiye.
“Alha neiya akenglia lamjot ganhing tapou chu aboncha nang ho dinga thet umtah ahiuve.
Ahin alha neihen lang akeng lin lam jot jeng jong leh leiset chunga achople na thei dinga akengphang chunga akhutjung neikit ho vang chu nethei nauvin nate.

Nang hon naneh thei dingu chu hicheng hi ahi: itobang hijongle khaokho pou pou naneh theiyuva, khaokho mul bei ho chu itobang hijong naneh thei diu, itobang hijongle khongbai pou pou naneh theiyuva, khaokhopi jat ho jong chu itobang hijongle naneh thei diu ahi.
Hintin alha neiya ganhing dang jouse vang chu nang ho dinga thet umtah hi ding ahi.
“Hichenga hi nangho nakisuh boh thei diu ahi; akisei ho hi koi hijong le athilong tongkha aum jongle nilhah geiya aboh-a um jeng ding,
chujongle koi koi ahiya hiche ho thilong hi atahsa anapo kha a auma ahijongleh ama chun aponsil akisop’a nilhah geiya aboh-a um ding ahi.
Gancha a tin kika a ahivanga atin nia lenglha pailou chule anehsa ihdoh kit’a lhai kit lou tapou chu nang ho dinga aboh ahi; koi hijongle hiche gancha boh ho tongkha a jong chu aboh ahitai.
Sa lah a akenglia lamjot hijongle akhopeh a tol chon jouse jong chu nang ho dinga aboh jeng ahiuve; koi hijongle hitobang sa ho thilong tongkha jeng jong chu nilhum keiya aboh-a um ding ahiye;

chujongle hitobang sa ho thilong hal khat tou kipoh khah-a auma ahijongle ama chun aponsil jouse akisop’a nilhum keiya aboh, a um jeng ding ahitai; ajeh chu hichengse hi nang ho dinga aboh jeng jeng ahiuve.
“Leiset chunga ahon hona kiloiya aboh a vah ganhing lah a jong hicheng hi nang ho dinga aboh ahiuve: khoili ahin, jucha ahin, thangkip len ahin, chule thangkip to kilimlo jouse jong ahin,
daidep ahin, tang ahin, thangkip ahin, tangnam ahin, ju-thangkip ahiye.
Ahona kiloi ganhing lah-a hichengse chu nang ho dinga aboh jeng ahiuvin, hiche ho hi athi tengleh along tongkha chan chu koi koi hijengjongle nilhum keiya aboh a um jeng ding ahitai.

Hiche ganhing ho hi athiteng ahung lhah mang nauva alhah khah pen pen thil chu ipi hijongleh, thinglom chung hihen, ponsil chung hileh, savun chung hihen lang dip chung hijongleh, ipi pia kimang jing bel chung hijeng jongleh, alhah khum pen pen chu aboha um jeng ding ahi; hijeh-a chu alhah khah pen pen chu twiya de ding, nilhum keiya aboh a umden jeng ding ahi; ni alhum jou teng vang leh athenga um ding ahitai.
Hitobangma chu hiche ganhing boh ho chu leibel sung khat touva ahung lhah lut khah-a ahitah jongle abel sunga thil um jouse jong aboh a umtha jeng ding ahin, aleibel jeng jong navohkeh hel diu ahiye.

Neh thei khat hijongleh hiche chu twiya sop’a kichai thei ahitapoi, aboh-a chu um jeng ding ahi; aleibel sunga don thei twi ana um khah a khat touvin adonkhah a ahijongleh atwi aboh banga adona jong chu aboh a um jeng ding ahiye.

Hita chu ipi tobang thil hijeng jong leh hiche ganhing boh hon athi nung jenguva jong alhah khum pen pen chu aboh a um jeng ding ahi; meithuh hihen, thaomei boma an honna hileh, alhah khum pen pen chu vohchip jeng ding ahiye; hiche thil ho chu abohgam ahitauvin, nang ho dinga jong thilboh jeng ahitauve.

Amavang twinah ham ahiloule twisam hung putdohna twi kikho jing jeng lai ham khat ahikhah a ahileh hiche vang chu thengdoh ding ahinai; ahin thil dang vang chu atongkha pen pen chu hiche ganhing boh thilong atoh khah jeh a chu aboh-a um jeng ding ahi.
Hiche ganhing boh ho thilong tahsa hal khat tou chun tu dinga kikoi muchi ham khat alhah khum tah a ahileh, amuchi vang chu athenga umdoh ding ahin;
ahinla muchi chu twi chapnousa ahivang leh, chule hiche chapnousa muchi chu hiche ganhing boh thilong chun alhah khahtah vangle chun nang ho dinga amuchi chu aboh a um ding ahitai.
“Nang hon naneh ngaiyu gancha khat tou athitah-a ahileh, hiche gancha thilong tongkha pen pen chu koi hijeng jong leh aboh a nilhum keiya um ding ahi,

chujongle hiche gancha mohthi sa nekha aum jongle ama chun aponsil jouse akisop lhah a nilhum keiya aboh a um ding ahi; hitobangma a chu koi hijongle hiche gancha thilong polea pang pen pen jong chun aponsil jouse akisop lhah a nilhum keiya aboh a um ding ahiye.
“Leiset chunga ahon hona kiloiya kithol tho ganhing jouse chu nang ho dinga thet umtah ahiuve; hitobang ganhing chu neh louhel ding ahi.

Ipi hijongle aoipoh-a kithol thoa, ipi hijongle akenglia pansa aoiya kithol tho, keng tampi neiya kithol tho, hitobanga leiset chunga ahon hona kiloiya kithol tho jouse chu nang ho dinga neh louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche ganhing ho chu thet umtah tah ahiuve.

Nang hon hitobanga ahon hona kiloiya aoiya kithol tho ganhing thet um ho chu nasuh khah uva nang ho le nang ho thet uma nakisemdoh louhel diu ahi; hichenga chu nang ho le nang ho hita chu nakisuh boh lou diu ahiye; achutilouva ahileh aboh a namoh umgamsih seh diu ahi.

Ipijeh-inem itileh keima hi nang ho Pathen kahin, hijeh a chu nakisuh thenguva keima kathen banga hi nang ho jong nathen dingu ahiye. Chujongle leiset chunga ahon hona kiloiya aop’a kithol tho ganhing ho hi kisuh bohna nanei louhel dingu ahi.
Ajeh pentah chu keima hi nang ho Pathen hi dinga nang ho Egypt gamsunga kona hinpuidoh pa Pakai chu kahin, keima kathen banga hi nang ho jong nathen diu ahiye,” ati.
Tua kisei hi sa le vacha, chule twi lah a cheng ganhing jouse leh twi lah a kithol jouse ahin, chule leiset chunga ahon hona kiloiya vah le ganhing jouse ahin, achung changuva dan kisem chu ahin,
hitobang ganhing ho chu aboh le atheng dat khen them theina ding, ganhing neh thei dol leh ganhing neh theilou dol het khenna dinga kisem dan chu ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel chate jah-a seipeh- in lang hitin tin, ‘Numei khat touvin nao avop’a anaoso teng acha chu pasal ahiya ahileh, hiche numei chu athi neipet’a bang banga chu, ni sagi sunga aboha uma atheng louva um jeng ding ahi.
Chule niget lhin ni leh achapa chu achep kitanpeh ding ahiye.

Chujou tengjongleh hiche numeinu chun athisana kona akithensona dinga nisom thum le nithuma je achan nah lai ding ahi; chuta amanu kithensona ding nikho kitep jat alhin masangsea hiche numei chun thil thenga kikoiho jong atham khah louhel ding, houin munthenga jong hung lut louhel ding ahi.

Ahin hitobang numei chun cha ahindoh chu numeima ma ahivang leh, athi neipet’a tobang banga chu, hapta ni sunga aboh-a um ding; chujou teng jongleh athisana kona akithensona dinga chu nisom gup le nigup ma anga kit’a jechang nalai ding ahi.

“Chapa pen chung chang hihen lang chanu pen chung hileh acha hingnu kisuh thengna ding nikho chu anijat alhin teng, amanu chun kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula thempupa henga chu pumgo thilto dinga kum khat lhingsa kelngoinou khat ahinkaiya, chule chonset thiltoa todoh dinga vapalnou ham vakhu ham ahinchoi ding;

hiteng chuleh thempupan anumei nao neinu dinga chu kithoina abolpeh-a athilto ding chu Pakai angsunga atopeh ding ahin; chujou tengle amanu chu athisan lonna a kona chu thengdoh ding ahibep nalaiye. Hiche kisei dan hi chapa hihen chanu hileh numei chahing pen pen dinga kisei ahiye.

Numei chahingnu chun kelngoinou khat atodoh jou louva ahileh vakhu nou ni ham ahiloule vapalnou ni ham ahinchoiya, khat pen pen chu pumgo thiltoa pansah ding chule akhatjoh jong chu chonset thilto dinga nganse ding ahin, hichea chu thempupan amanu dinga kithoina abolpeh a chujou tengleh numeinu chu athenga um ding ahi," ati.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Mihem khat tou atahsa avun chunga apomdoh ham aboldoh ham ahilou jongle aduldoh ham auma, hiche nat chu atahsa avuna chu ahung patdoh jeng tah a aphah dinga ginmo ahitah a ahileh, hitobang mi chu thempupa Aaron heng ham ahiloule achapate thempuho heng ham a kipui lut’a,

chutah le thempupan atahsa vun apat lai chu phatah a avetchil ding ahi; hichea chu avun apat laiya atimul chu akantah-a, chule apat lai chu atahsa vun sanga asung lut dana akimua ahileh, hitobang tipat nat chu phah nat ahiye; hita chu thempupan a vet toh a ahitengleh hitobanga natna neiya mihem chu thempupan aphah ahibouve, aboh ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahi.

Amavang apat laiya atahsa vun chu akantah-a, chule akang chu avun sanga sunglutjo loulai ahiya, chujongle atimul jong akan hih laiya ahileh, thempupan anapa chu ni sagi sungma a ajechansah kit nah lai ding;

ni sagi lhin ni chuleh thempupan avela avetchil kit’a, hichea chu thempupa mitmua jong anat chu akisutang ahitah-a, chule atipat chu avun danga jong achalbe deh tah louva ahileh, thempupan anapa chu ni sagi sung kitma a dinga ajechansah kit ding ahi;

chujou teng ni sagi lhin kit ni chuleh thempupan anapa chu avetchil kit’a atipat lai chu avom tah a, atahsa vun chung adanga jong achalbe chom deh tah louva ahileh, thempupan ama chu atheng ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahiye; hitobang tipat chu tichung moh boldoh mai maibou ahin, atipatpa chun aponsil chengse a kisop ngima athenga um ding ahijenge.
Amavang atiboldoh lai chu atahsa vun danga jong ijem tia thempun avetchil nung geiya jong, ahung chalbe nah laiya ahileh, ama chu thempupa henga akivetchil sah dinga chekit ding ahiye;

chutengle thempupan ama chu vetchilna neiyin tin, atiboldoh lai chu atahsa vun dang chunga jong achalbea ahileh, thempupan amapa chu aboh ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahi; ajeh chu hitobang nat chu phahnat ahiye.
“Mihem khat chu phahnat’a anat tengleh thempupa henga puilut ding,

thempupan aphah pa chu avetchil soh keiya, hichea chu avuna akang tobanga ahung duldoh a, hiche akanglai chun atimul jengjong akansah tah a, chujongle adul laiya chu avouthah lih leh akimu doh a ahileh,
hitobang nat chu atahsa vun sunga umden phahnat ahin, hijeh a chu thempupan aphah pa chu aboh ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahi; jejong achansah sah angai tapoi, ajeh chu amapa chu aboh ahitai.
Chule hiche phahnat na chu atahsa vun chunga akithe thangsoh hel tah-a, hijeh a chu phahnat chun aphah pa chu thempupa mitmu dola, alujanga pat akeng phang geiya atom lhah deh jeng tah a ahileh,

thempupan ama chu phatecha avetchil ding, hichea chu phahnat chun aphah pa chu atahsa apumpia atomjolsa ahimong mong tah a ahileh, thempupan ama chu hiche aphahnat jeh a chu aboh ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahiye: ahinla aphahnat chu atinakhem jouse akansoh tah a ahileh atheng ahitai.
Hintin amapa tahsa chunga chu avouthah ahung kilah doh be be nah laiya ahileh aboh a um jing ding ahiye.
Thempupan jong atahsa vouthah chu avetchil peh a amapa chu aboh ahi, tia aphondoh ding ahi; vouthah hung kilah doh ji chu aboh ahiye, ijehinem itileh hiche chu phahnat ahi.
Ijemtia avouthah chu akhip kit’a chule ahung kandoh a ahileh, aphahpa chu thempu henga hunga,
thempupan amapa chu avetchil ding, anatna chu akansoh tah a ahung kikhelsoh tah a ahileh, thempupan amapa chu aphah a thengdoh kit mihem ahitai, ama hi atheng tai, tia aphondoh ding ahi.
“Mihem khat tou atahsa atichunga uilut mapon auma,
ijemtia hiche amapon laiya chu anaikang ahung duldoh a, ahilou jongleh sankang lih leh a ahung pomdoh a ahileh, anat chu thempupa vetsah ding ahi;

hita chu thempupan avetchila, anatna chu avun sanga asung lut joh a, chule atimul jeng jong akansah a ahitah leh, thempupan amapa chu aboh ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh anat chu phahnat ahin, uilut lima hung umdoh ahitai.

Amavang thempupan avetchila chu atina laiya atimul chu akan hih laiya, chule anat jong asung lut hih lai nah a, analai jeng jong chu avoma ahileh, thempupan amapa chu ni sagi sunga ajechansah ding ahi;
ijemtia anat chu avun chunga ahung kithejal be kit’a ahileh, thempupan amapa chu aboh ahi, tia aphondoh ding ahi, hiche jong chu phahnat ma ahiye.
Hintin anatna chu mun khatseh seh a aumden jenga kithejah louva aum leh, hiche tipat chu uilut khem ahin, hijeh a chu thempun amapa chu atheng ahinai, tia aphondoh ding ahi.
“Mihem tahsa meiyin akah khah tah a, meiyin akahna avun le avoujang chu ahung duldoh-a chule sankang heo heuva ham, ahiloule akang hama ahung umdoh-a ahileh,

thempun analai meikah lai chu avetchila, hichea chu adul laiya atimul geiya ahung kandoh tah-a chujongle avun sanga asung lut joh tah a ahileh, hiche jong chu phahnat ahin, meikah maha a chu hung soh doh a ahitai, thempupan amapa chu aboh ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh anat chu phahnat ahi.
Amavang thempupan anat chu avetchila, anatna laiya atimul jong akandeh hih laiya, anatna chu avun sanga asung lut hih laiya, avoma ahileh thempupan amapa chu ni sagi sunga ajechansah ding ahi;

ni sagi lhin ni chuleh thempupan anapa chu avetchil kit’a, ijemtia anatna chu avun chung dung mundanga jong achalbea ahileh, thempupan a mapa chu aboh ahitai tia aphondoh ding ahi; ajeh chu anatna chu phahnat ahibouve.

Hintin anatna aduldoh lai chu mun khatseh seh a aumdena, achalbe chomdeh hih a avuna kithejah louva auma, avomjoh a ahileh, aduldoh lai chu mei kah jeh a hung duldoh ahibouvin, hijeh a chu thempupan amapa chu aboh ahipoi, tia aphondoh ding ahiye; ajeh chu mei kah maha chu akhema hung kisemdoh ahibouve.
“Pasal ham numei ham khat’in aluchung ham, akhalhang dung hama tina aneiya ahileh,

thempupan anatna tina chu avetchil peh ding ahi; ijemtia hichea tina chu avun sanga asung lutjoh a, chule atina laiya atimul jong chu aen a avoi chet jenga ahileh, thempupan tina veipa chu aboh ahi, tia aphondoh ding ahi; ajeh chu hiche tina chu tithah nat khat ahin, luchung le khalhang dunga chuthei phahnatna ahi.

Ahinla thempupan avetchila chu hiche tithah nat chu avun sanga asung lut hih laiya, atina laiya jong timul vom aum hih a ahileh, thempupan hitobang tina veiya tithah neipa chu ni sagi sunga ajechansah ding ahi;

chule ni sagi alhin teng leh thempupan anatna chu avetchil peh kit’a, hichea chu atithah chu akithejal louva, analaiya jong chu timul eng akimu louva, atithah jeng jong chu avun sanga sung lutjo lou dana akimudoh a ahileh,

tina veipa chun atahsa tah a atimul chu akivochai ding, atithah laitah vang avochai deh lou ding ahi; hichea chu thempupan amapa chu hiche tithah a anatna jeh a chu ni sagi sungma ajechansah kit nah lai ding;

ni sagi alhin teng chuleh thempupan atithah lai chu avetchil peh kit’a, hichea chu atithah chua vun dunga achalbe chom deh hih a, avun sanga jong asung lutjoh deh louva ahileh, thempupan amapa chu atheng ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahi; hiche phat le chun aman aponsil jouse akisop ngima athenga um ding ahitai.
Hichea chun athenga aum nunga chu ijemtia atichunga ahung thalbe kit tah a ahileh,
thempupan amapa chu avetchilseh kit ding, atithah chu atichung danga jong amachalbe jeng tah a ahileh, thempu ding chun atimul aen le aenlou hol hol angai tapoi, amapa chu aboh ahijenge.

Amavang thempupa mit vet a chu atithah chu akisutang dana’ amua atithah laiya jong timul vom ahung kedoh tah a, atithah jong chu adamtah a ahileh amapa chu atheng ahitai, hijeh a chu thempupan jong amapa chu atheng ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahi.
“Pasal ham numei ham khat chun atahsa atichunga chu aduldoh, akanga ahung duldoh khat tou aneiya ahileh,
thempupan adullai chu vetchilna aneiya, atahsa atichunga aduldoh lai chu akandup seh suh a, atihumdoh mai mai ahileh, avuna hung kiphongdoh ahitai, hijeh chun amapa chu athengah ahitan ahi.
“Mihem khat tou alujang sam apul ngim hel jeng tah a alutol hel a aum tah a ahijongle amavang chu athenga umah ahinai.
Chujongle mihem khat tou chu achalsam apul ngim hel jeng tah-a adehsam abeihel jeng tah jongle ama chu adetola hing ahitan, amavang chu atheng ahinai.

Hintin hiche adehtol laiya chu hihen lang achaltol lai chu hijongle avun sanpih peh a hung duldoh ham khat auma ahileh, hiche aduldoh lai chu asung lama kona phahnatna hung kiphongdoh ahitan, achaltol laile adehtol laiya chu hung umdoh ahi.
Chujou tengleh thempupan amapa chu avetchila achaltol lai ham adehtol lai hama a tina ahung pomdoh lai chu tichunga phahnatna hung kilangdoh banga khu asanpih peh a ahileh,
amapa chu aphah a ahitan, athenglou aboh ahitai; hijeh a chu thempupan amapa chu aboh ahitai, tia aphondoh a, aluchanga chu anatna akipoh ding ahimaiye.
“Mi damlou aphah chun ponse jeng akisila, alujangsam alhaiya aput ding, anephu chung lam geiya pon akikhua, ‘Aboh, aboh,’ tia asap sap ding ahi.
Hitobang mi chun dammona anei sungsea aboh a umjingjeng ding ahi; ama chu aboh ahitai, achangseh a ngahmun polama miphah chenna mun khat’a cheng ding ahiye.
“Ponsil von khat touva phahnat tina abekhah a ahile, samul pon hihen lang tupat ponnem hijongle,
adung avaiya kipheh a kikhong tupat ponnem hihen, samul pon hita leh, savun hihen lang ipi dang thil khat savuna kisem hijeng jongleh,

hitobang ponsil chunga chu atina chu adumjil jel ham, asanpih peh ham a ahung kihetdoh a ahileh, ponsil chu lutah a adung avaiya kipheh a kikhong hita hen lang savun le savuna kikhong ipi tobang ponsil hijeng jongleh, anatna chu phahnatna ahin, hijeh a chu thempu vetsah tei tei ding ahitai.
Thempupan anatna chu khol chilsoh keiyin tin, hitobang nat’a napen pen mi chu ni sagi sunga ajechansah ding ahin;

ni sagi lhin ni leh thempupan anat chu avetchil kit ding ahi. Hichea chu anatna chu ponsil chunga achalbe kit nah laiya ahileh, aponsil chu adung avaiya kipheh chal chep’a kikhong hihen lang, savun hijong le ipi tobang hijongle savuna kikhong jeng jong chu achunga beh a natna chu natna khoh tah phahnat ahin, hijeh a chu aponsil chu aboh ahijenge.

Amipa chun aponsil chu agovam jeng ding ahi, adung avaiya kipheh chal chep a kikhong pon hihen lang, samul hihen tupat ponnem hita leh, savuna kisem von hijongle anatna achunga beh a chu nat khoh tah ahijeh chun phahnatna ahin, meiya govam hel ding ahibouve.
“Thempupa chun avet a hiche adung avaiya kipheh chal chep’a kikhong ponsil chunga chu hihen lang savuna kisem von hileh, natna chu achalbe deh louva ahivang le chun,
thempupan thu apeh a mihon nat bena ponsil chu asop ngimuva, chujou tengleh thempupan aponsil chu ni sagi sunga ajechansah kit nah lai ding;

chule nat bena ponsil chu akisop ngim jou phat jongle thempupan a vela avetchil ding ahi. Hichea chu nat bena anat chu akisop lhah jou tah hih a ahileh, anatna chu ponsil chunga anachalbe lou vanga, ponsil chu aboh a um jeng ding ahi; phahnatna chu ponsil asung lam ham apolam ham a beh hijongle aponsil chu meiya govamjeng ding ahitai.

“Thempupan avetchil pet’a chu mihon asop ngim jouvuva nat bena lai chu avomdena ahileh, hichelai chu ponsil vona kona chu abo-lhah jeng thei ding ahi, savuna kisem von hihen adung avaiya kipheh a kikhong hijongleh;

hiche nunga jong chu natna chu ponsil chung ham, adung avaiya kipheh a kikhong von chung ham, savuna kisem von chung ham chule ipi tobang von hijongle savuna kisem chung jenga jong ahung kimudoh kit’a ahileh anatpi chu ahing nalai ahin akithe thang thang nalai ahiye; abena pen pen chu meiya nagovam jeng diu ahitai.

Ahin ponsil ham, adung avaiya kipheh-a kikhong von ham, savuna kisem von ham ahiloule itobang ponsil hijongle savuna kikhong jeng jong chu nasop ngimuva kona chu natpi chu abeitah a ahivang leh anivei lhin nan jong sop kit’uvin lang hileu chun theng ding ahitai,” ati.

Hicheng kisei hi phahnatna ponsil chung ham, samul pon chung ham, tupat ponnem chung ham, adung avaiya kipheh a kikhong ponsil chung ham, ipi von hijongle savuna kisem jeng achunga hiche phahnatna natpi abejeh a abolna ding dan hita bola athen aboh phot chetna ding dan ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Hiche hi miphah akisuh theng nikhoa manchah ding dan chu ahi. Miphah chu thempupa henga hinpuiya,
thempupa jong chu ngahmun polama potdoh ding, hita chu thempupan kholchilna aganei ding ahiye. Hichea chu miphah pa phahna chu achunga akidamsah sa ahiya ahileh,
thempupan akisutheng dingpa kisuh thengna dinga chu miho thu apeh-a vacha hing athengsel ni agamat sah a cedar thing agalah sah ding, ponsan ao thim le hyssop pon aga lah sah ding;
hichea chu thempupan twi lhailai chung khat’a hi leibel sunga miho chu vacha athasah ding ahi.
Aman vacha ahing nalai chuleh cedar thing chutoh, ponsan ao thim le hyssop pon chu alah tha a twi lhai lai chunga kithat vacha thisan chu adenat cheh ding,

hita chu aphahnat na a kona kisutheng ding mipa chunga chu athisan sagi veijen athin khuma, chujou tengleh aphahpa chu athengtai, tia aphondoh a vacha hingjong chu vahinga alhadoh ding, gamlah a alha mang ding ahitai.

Chujongle akithenso dingpa chun aponsiljouse aboncha akisop ngima, asam jong akivo ngim ding, twiya kisil thengsela, chutengle amapa chu theng ding ahitai; hicheng kin akibol chaisoh phat le chun atila aphah pa chu ngahmuna hung lut ding ahitan, hijongle amapa chu aponbuh polama ni sagi sunga nichong nalai ding ahiye.

Chule ni sagi lhin ni chuleh alujang sam aboncha akivochai soh hel ding; anemul akhamul jouse leh amitmul jouse geiya akivochai ding, asama kai tapou chu aboncha avochaihel ding ahi. Chujou teng amapan aponsil jouse akisop ngimsoh keiya, atahsa chu twiya asop lhah ding, kisil theng ding, hiche tengle chunbou amapa chu theng ding ahiye.

“Niget lhin ni leh atila miphah pa chun nolnabei kelngoi chal ni leh nolnabei ma ma kelngoi pi khat agakaiya, akelngoi chu kum khat lhingsa hi ding, chule chang bong neldi set thaotwi kichapsa ephah dim khat hopsoma hop thum toh aga lah-a, thaotwi log dim khat toh aga thal ding ahi.
Chutengle miphah pa suthenga pang ding thempupan miphahpa chuleh thil hichengse chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbul, Pakai angsunga atoutha sah ding ahi.
Hichea chu thempupan kelngoi chal khatjoh chu amat’a log khat dim thaotwi chutoh themmo thiltoa pang dinga atodoh a, hiche teni chu Pakai angsunga thenso thilto dinga athenso ding ahi;

chujoule aman kelngoi chal chu mihon chonset thilto le pumgo thilto atha nau muna muntheng kiti laiya chu atha ding ahi; ajeh chu themmona thilto jong hi chonsetna thilto banga chu thempupa chan ding ahin, athil kitohsa chu atheng chung nung pen khat ahiye.

Hiche themmo thilto thisan chu thempupan them khat tou ahamdoh a, hita chu thempupan hiche thisan chu akithenso dingpa ajetlam bilkol geiya aloinat peh a chule ajetlam khut akhopia anunat peh ding, akengjetlam khopia jong aloinat peh ding ahi.
Chule thempupan log dim khat’a kona thaotwi chu them khat athaldoh kit’a hiche thaotwi chu akhut veilam khut phanga asun lhah ding,
hichea chu ama khut veilam khut phanga asun lhahsa thaotwi chu akhut jetlam khut junga akhoinat'a, hita chu Pakai angsung thaotwi them khat chu sagi veijen athin khum ding ahi.

Chule akhut’a um nalai thaotwi phabep chu thempupan akisu theng ding pa ajetlam abilkol geiya aloipeh a, ajetlam akhutpia jong anunat peh ding, chujongle akeng phang jetlam khopia jong hichu themmo thilto thisan kiloina chunga chu anunatpeh ding ahi.

Hichele chun thempupan akhut laiya thaotwi avaldoh nalai chengse chu mi akisiltheng dingpa luchanga anupeh ding ahitai. Hita chu thempupan Pakai angsunga miphahpa dinga chu kithoidamna abolpeh ding ahiye.

Thempupan abohna angim louna a kona kisuthenga kithoidam dingpa dinga chu chonset thilto chu abolpeh a thoidamna abolpeh ding ahi. Hiche hi abol chai tengleh aman pumgo thilto jong chu athapai pai ding;
chule thempupan pumgo thilto le lhosoh thilto chu maicham chunga agatodoh ding ahi. Hita chu thempupan aphahpa chu athoi ding, hichele chun aphahpa chu theng ding ahiye.

“Miphahpa chu mivaicha ahikhah tah a thilto hijatpi chu atojou lou lom tah a ahijongle, kelngoi chal khatbeh vang themmo thiltoa pang dinga atodoh tei tei ding, hiche chu amapa kithoina dinga kithenso ding, chujongle chang bong neldi sel thaotwi kichap kotsa ephah dim khat hopsoma hop khat lhosoh thilto dinga thaotwi log dim khat toh hitha ding ahi;
hita chu aman atojou kham khama vakhu ni ahiloule vapalnou ni jong akhela atothei ahinai; vacha khat chu chonset thilton pang intin, chule vacha khatma chu pumgo thiltoa pang ding ahiye.
Niget lhin ni leh miphahpa chun thilto hicheng chu akisuh thengna dinga kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbul Pakai angsunga thempupa henga ahinchoi ding ahi;
chule thempupan themmo thiltoa kitoh kelngoi chu amat’a log khat dim thaotwi chutoh alah ding, anigela chu thempupan thenso thiltoa pang dinga Pakai angsunga athenso ding ahi.

Chutengle aman themmo thiltoa kitohsa kelngoi chu atha ding ahin, thempupan themmo thilto kelngoi thisan chu them khat alah a akisutheng dingpa jetlam bilkol geiya aloipeh, akhut jetlam khutpia jong aloipeh ding, akeng phangjetlam akhopia toh aloipeh ding ahi.
Chujongle thempupan ama khutma ma aveilama chu thaotwi them khat asun lhah a,
akhut veilam khut phang kimlaiya kisung lhasa thaotwi chu akhut jetlam akhut junga them khat akhoinat kit’a Pakai angsunga chu sagi veijen a the khum khum jeng ding ahi.

Chujongle akisutheng dingpa bilkol jetlam ageiya chu thempupan thaotwi them khat anunat ding, akhut jetlam khutpi leh akeng phangjetlam akhopiajong, themmo thilto thisan kiloina chunga chu anunat peh cheh ding ahi;
chule thempupa khut phang sunga aval umden nalai thaotwi chengse chu aman akisutheng dingpa luchanga anupeh a, ama chu Pakai angsunga athoidam ding ahi.
Chujongle miphahpa chun ajo kham khama vakhu ni chu hihen lang vapalnou ni chu hijongleh ato ding,

lhosoh thilto pum puma vacha khat chu chonset thilto dinga atodoh a chule vacha khatma chu pumgo thilto dinga atodoh ding; hiche teng chuleh thempupan akisutheng ding pa dia chu Pakai angsunga kithoidamna abolpeh ding ahi.
Hiche hi mihem aphahnat na a kona akisuh thengna dinga thilto alhingset’a tohjou loupa dinga dan kisem chu ahiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:
“Keiman nang ho chenna dinga kapeh Canaan gamsung nalhun tengu leh, ijemtia hiche nachennau gamsunga chu koi tobang khat insunga phahnatna kalut khahsah tah a ahileh,
hiche in neipa chu thempupa henga hunga ahung sei ding, ‘Keima insunga natna hi itidol ham khat’in lung opkai a um lheh jenge,’ tia ahil ding ahi.

Hitah chuleh thempupan anatna chu vetchilna anei masanga acheng miho chun abonchau va insung chu adalhah diuva aseipeh a thempupan thu apeh masah ding ahi achuti louva ahileh ainsunga cheng miho chu abonchauva aboh ahitauve, tia kiphongdoh jeng diu ahitai; hijeh a chu mihon ainsung chu adalhah soh tengle bou thempupa insunga lut bep nalai ding ahiye.

Chule thempupan anatna chu avetchilsoh keiya, hiche natna chu inbang dunga anabeuva, adumjiljel ham ahiloule asanpheh phuh banga akilah doh theiya, chujongle hiche natpi hochu in bang sanga asung lutjoh a ahileh,
thempupa chu insunga kona potdoh a kotpi akal lhah ding, chule ni sagi sunga jechang dinga in chu kotpi akamkhum ding ahitai.
Ni sagi lhin ni chuleh thempupa chu hung kit’a ahung vet kit ding, hichea chu natpi chu in bang mun dang dangajong anakithe thangbe kit’a ahileh
thempupan miho thu apeh a in bang song chunga nat pi bena chengse chu akhodoh soh keiyuva khopi polam aboh lai khat’a agase mang diuva aseipeh ding ahin;

aman jong insung lamsese chu athetngim sah soh keiya akimvel lhung keiya akhodoh sah ding, chujongle vai athah loinam sah ding ahi, ahin akikhoh lha chengse vang chu khopi polam munboh lai khat’a agaboh lhah diu ahibouve;
hita chu natpi bena song kikhoh doh chengse nunga chu song dang ajelut kit’uva, aman inloina lou alah a ain chu aloinam kit ding ahiye.
“ljemtia aman natpi bena song ho akhodoh a athetngim jou chule aloinam nunga chu insunga natpi ahung kithejah kit nah laiya ahileh,
thempupa chu che kit’a agavet kit ding; hita chu natpi mong mong chu insunga anakithejah kit’a ahile hiche nat chu miphahna nat khoh tah insunga hung lut ahitan, hijeh chun ain chu aboh ahitai.

Chuti ahijeh a chu aman jong ain chu aphet lhah jeng ding, asong jouse hihen lang ainthing ho hileh, ain vai kiloinam jouse pum puma aphet lhah tha ding, aboncha chu khopi polam munboh lai khat’ a agathah mang ding ahi.
Hicheng kalvala jong hi ainboh a kikoiya kotpi kikamdensa chu akot akikam pet’a ainsunga lut khapen pen chu koi hijeng jongleh nilhum keiya aboh a um jeng ding ahiye;
hijeh a chu koi hijongle insunga lumkha pen penin jong aponsil jouse akisop ngim ding, insunga an nekha pen pen jong chu aponsil jouse akisop ngim ding ahi.

“Amavang thempupa chu ahunga ahung vet’a chu natpi chu insung akiloinam jou kalsea insunga anakithejah tah hih a ahileh, thempupan ain chu atheng ahitai, tia aphondoh ding ahi, ajeh chu anatna chu kiboldam peh ahitan ahi.
Hichea in suh thengna dinga chu aman vacha neocha ni aga kimat’a, cedar thing le ponsan ao thim toh, hyssop pon toh ahin choiya,
vacha teni lah-a khatjoh joh chu twi long pet chunga leibel sung khat’a akhuma atha ding,

chutengle cedar thing le hyssop pon, ponsan ao thim chutoh, vacha ahing nalai chutoh ahinchoiya, aboncha chu twi long pet chunga kithatsa vacha thisan lah-a chu adelut ding, chujou tengleh ain chu thisan sagi veijen athin khum khum ding ahi.
Hita chu aman ain chu vacha thisan toh, twi long pet chutoh, vacha hing chutoh, cedar thing chutoh, hyssop pon chutoh, ponsan ao thim chutoh athoa asuh theng ding ahi;
chutengle vacha hing chu aman khopi sunga kona gamlah langa alhadoh a, hichea chu in athoiya suh thengna abol ding, chuteng in chu athenga um ding ahitai,” ati.
Hiche danthu hi miphah natna chung changa manchah ding danthu ahiye: tithah hihen lang,
ponsil chungle inchunga hung chujeng phahnatna chung chang hihen,
ahung pomdoh ham, ahung duldoh ham, ahung boldoh ham hijongle
hiche ho chu ahitai, atheng ahitai, ti vetsahna dinga danthu kisem ahiye. Hita chu miphah natna chunga danthu kisem chu hiche hi ahi. Mihem ahinpia kona thilong
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah-a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:
“Israel chate jah-a seipeh lhonin lang hitin tilhonin, ‘Pasal khat tou ahinpia thilong auma ahileh hiche athilongdoh chu aboh ahiye.

Hiche athilon jeh a pasalpa abohna chung changa danthu kisem chu hiche hi ahi: atahsa a kona athilong chu ahung londoh doh jenga ahijongleh, ahilouva atahsa a chu aimkit’a alondoh sah da a ahijongleh, amapa chu asunga aboh-a umah ahi.
Hiche athilongpa lup khahna jalkhun chu aboh-a um jeng ding; ipi tobang thil hijongle aman atoupha chan chu aboh-a um ding ahi.
Hijeh a chu mi koi hijongle athilongpa jalkhun tongkha pen pen jong chun aponsil jouse akisop ngima ama mong mong jong twiya kisil theng ding, nilhum geiya aboh-a um ding ahi.
Chutima chu mi koi hijongle hiche athilongpa touna toukha jouse jong chun aponsil jouse akisop ngima, ama jeng jong twiya kisil theng ding, nilhum geiya aboh-a um ding ahi.
Hitobangma chu koi hijongle hiche athilongpa tahsa tongkha jouse chun aponsil jouse akisop ngima, ama jeng jong twiya kisil theng ding, nilhum geiya aboh-a um ding ahi.

Chule hiche athilongpa chun mi angim napet khat chunga achil aset khah a ahijongle aset khumpen pen chun aponsil jouse akisop ngima, ama jeng jong twiya kisil theng ding, chule nilhum geiya aboh-a um ding ahi.
Hita chu hiche thilongpa touna sakol chungthap jong chu aboh-a um jeng ding ahiye.

Ipi higongle athia longpa noiya umsa thil tongkha pen pen jong chu nilhum keiya aboh a um jeng ding ahi: hitobang thil kipohle mihem jong chun aponsil jouse akisop ngim ding, ama jeng jong twiya kisil thenga, chujou tengle nilhum keiya aboh a um nalai ding ahiye.
Mihem koi hijongle hiche thilongpan akhut twiya kisil theng louva atham khah tapou chun aponsil jouse akisop ngima, ama jeng jong twlya kisil theng ding chule nilhum keiya aboh a um ding ahi.
Chule hiche athilongpan atohkhah leibel tapou chu vohkeh hel ding ahi: chultengle thinga kisui manchah ahijongleh hiche chu twiya sop ngimsel ding ahi.
