“Athia long pasal chu akiboldam tengleh, athilonna a kona akiboldam jeh a chu aman jong akisuh thengna dinga ni sagi sungma anga kit nah lai ding, aponsil jouse jong akisop ngimsoh kei ding ahi; hita chu atahsa ahinpi jong chu twilong alhai pet laiya akisop’a akisil theng ding, chujou tengleh theng ding ahibouve.
Niget lhin ni leh athia longpa chun vakhu ni hihen lang vapalnou ni hijongle ahinchoiya, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula Pakai angsunga chu hung lut ding, hiche vacha teni thu thempupa apeh ding ahi;

chutengle thempupan vacha teni chu khatjoh sang sang chonset thilto dinga atodoh peh-a chule khatjoh ma chu pumgo thilto dinga atopeh ding; hita chu thempupan amapa chu athilon jeh a Pakai angsunga athoi ding ahiye.
“Pasal khat touvin abotwi achedoh a ahileh atahsa pumpi chu twiya asil thenga chule nilhum keiya aboh-a um ding ahi.
Ponsil chung hihen lang savun chung hijongle abotwi vat lhah na pen pen chu twiya sop lhah ding, nilhum keiya aboh-a um ding ahiye.
Numei khat tou pasalin alup khomna lhona abotwi achekhuma ahileh anigellhona chu twiya kisil theng lhona chule nilhum keiya aboh-a um lhon ding ahiye.
“Numei khat touvin ahinpia hung longdoh ngai thilong doh anei tengleh amanu chu ni sagi sunga aboh-a um jeng ding, chule koi hijongle amanu tongkha chan chu nilhum keiya aboh-a um ding ahi.
Chujongle hiche athi nei laiya numei nun lupna aneipen pen ipi thil hijongle aboh-a um ding ahi; hitobangma a chu ipi thil hijongle atoupha pen pen jong aboh-a um jeng ding ahiye.

Hlita chu koi hijongle hiche numeinu lupna jalkhun jeng jong atongkha a auma ahileh, atongkhapa chun aponsil avon jouse akisop ngima, ama jeng jong twiya kisil theng ding, chule nilhum keiya aboh-a um ding ahitai.

Hitobangma a chu ipi tobang thil hijongle hiche numei thi nei nu toupha tongkha pen penin jong aponsil avon jouse akisop ngima, ama jeng jong twiya kisil theng ding, chule nilhum keiya aboh-a um ding ahi.
Hiche numei thi nei nu toupha pen pen pasalin atoh khah a ahileh atongkhapa chu nilhum keiya aboh-a um jeng ding ahiye.

Chule pasal khat touvin hiche numei thi nei nu chu luppi nom ten tena aluppi tah-a ahileh amanu thi nei chu apasalpa chunga nat ding ahitan, hijeh-a chu pasalpajong ni sagi sunga aboh-a um ding ahi; chujongle hiche pasalpa lupna jalkhun tapou chu aboh-a um kit jeng ding ahiye.

“Numei khat tou nikho sot tah sunga athi alon lon jeng tah a, athi nei phat mong jong hideh talouva, hita chu athi nei phat val hela athi alon lon jeng tah a ahileh, athilon sungsea chu amanu chu aboh-a um um jeng ding, angaiya athi nei laiya a um bang banga chu aboh-a um jeng ding ahi.

Hiche athilon sungsea alupna pen pen jalkhun jong chu angaiya athi nei laiya alupna jalkhun bang banga chu aboh-a um ding, ipi tobang thil hijongle hiche numei nun atoupha pen pen jong angaiya athi nei laiya atouna bang banga chu aboh-a um jeng ding ahi kit’e.
Chule hiche jalkhun chuleh touna chu atongkha a auma ahijongleh atongkha pen pen chun aponsil jouse akisop ngima, ama jeng jong twiya kisil theng ding, chule nilhum keiya aboh-a um jeng ding ahiye.
Ijemtia hiche numei chu athilonna a kona akiboldam theiya ahileh, amanu chu ni sagi sunga jechang ding, hichejou chuleh amanu chu theng bep ding ahiye.
Chujongle niget lhin ni chuleh numei nu chun vakhu ni hihen lang vapalnou ni hijongle akimat’a, hiche vacha teni chu thempupa henga, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu ah’inchoi ding ahi,

Chutengle thempupan vacha khatjoh joh chu chonset tltiltoa pang dinga atodoh peh a chule vacha khatjoh ma chu pumgo thiltoa pang dinga atopeh ding ahi; hita chu thempupan numeinu thiboh londoh jeh a chu Pakai angsunga amanu chu athoidam ding ahi.

“Hitobanga hi nang hon Israel chate chu abohnau a then lou nauva kona nachom huidoh dingu ahi; achutilouva ahi leh alailunguva kitung keima houbuh chu asuh boh uva, aboh nau athen lounauva thiden jeng ding ahiuve,” ati.
Hiche danthu hi pasal athineiya chule abotwi chedoh jeh a aboh-a umdoh pa dinga kisem ahi;

chujongle numei athinei pet aboh-a aumna chung chang le pasal hihen lang numei hile aphat louva ahinpia kona thi long long ho ding, chule numei athi nei pet’a luppi jeng pasal dinga danthu kisem chu ahiye.
Dan dih louva Pakai angsunga thilto abollhon jeh-a thi teni Aaron chapa teni thi nungin Pakaiyin Mose henga thu ahinseiyin,

Hichea chun Pakaiyin Mosejah-a hitin aseiye, “Nasopipa Aaron chu seipeh-in lang pondal kidahna kal muntheng lai, thingkong chunga kitung hepi touna maiya khun ama alut nom phat phat’in acham chamin hung moh lut lut hih hel hen, achutilouva ahileh athilo jeng ding ahi; ajeh chu hiche hepi touna chunga khu keima meiloma kilah ji ji kahiye.
Aaron chu hitobanga hi muntheng sunga hung lut thei ding ahi: chonset thiltoa to ding bongchal gol khat chule pumgo thiltoa to dinga kelngoi chal khat ahinkaiya

tupat ponnema kikhui sangkhol len chu aki-ah a, tupat ponnema kikhui tokachol jong chu akichen ding, chule tupat’a kipheh chal chep konggah a chu akong akigah a, tupat’a kikhong delkop akikop ding ahi; hichengse hi vontheng jeng ahiye. Hijeh-a chu thempupan jong atahsa apumpia twiya kisil thengsela chutengle bou hiche von chengse chu akivon ding ahi.
Chule Israel, chate khoppia kona chu chonset thiltoa to ding kelchal ni le pumgo thiltoa to ding kelngoi chal khat akimat ding ahi.
“Aaron chun ama ding mong monga jong bongchal khat agatodoh a chule ama dingle ainsung dinga kithoidamna abol masah ding ahi,
Chujou tengleh Aaron chun kelchal teni chu akaiya kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu Pakai angsunga adinsah ding;
hichea chu Aaronin jong kelchal teni dinga chu phun asan ding, aphun san khat chu Pakai ding hiya chule aphun san khatma chu Azazel chan ding hiyah ahiye.
Chujou tengleh Aaron chun Pakai chan dinga phun phatna, achunga phunchang hung chuhna kelcha chu akaiya, hiche chu chonset thiltoa atodoh ding ahi;

chutobangma a chu Azazel chan dinga phun phatna, achunga phunchang hung chuhna kelcha jong chu kithoidamna dinga Pakai angsunga ahinga kitohdoh ding, hita chu hiche kelcha chu Azazel chan dinga gamlah a ganhinga kilha mang ding ahiye.

“Hita chu Aaron in ama mong mong chonset thilto dinga bongchal chu atodoh ding, ama le ainsung kithoidamna abol masah ding, bongchal chu ama ding mong monga chonset thiltoa pang dinga akitha ding ahi.

Chujou tengleh Aaronin Pakai angsung maichama kona chu meiam gimnamtui lhutna kong khat dimset akilodoh a, chule phatecha kivochop dehsa gimnamtui khut dim ni set akihamdoh ding, hiche chu pondal kikhai kal a chu apoh lut ding ahin,

chule Pakai angsunga meikong lah a chu gimnamtui chu alelut ding, hiteng chuleh hettohsahna chunga kido hepi touna chu gimnamtui kilhut meikhu chun atom khum thei ding ahi, achutilouva ahileh athilo thei ding ahiye;
chujongle aman bongchal thisan chu them khat alah a akhut junga chu hepi touna maiya athe khuma, hita chu hepi touna masanga chu akhut junga hiche thisan chu sagi veijen athe khum khum jeng ding ahi.

“Chujou tengleh aman mipi dinga chonset thilto kelcha chu atha ding, athisan chu pondal sunga apoh’ lut ding, kelcha thisan jong chu bongchal thisan abolna bang banga chu abola hepi touna chung le hepi touna maiya athin khum khum ding ahiye.

Aman hita chu abola Israel chate bohna jeh le asuh khelnau jeh chule achonset chengseu jeh-a muntheng suhthenga thoidamna abolpeh ding; hitobang ma ma a chu alailunguva kisong athenlouna lah uva um jing kikhopna ponbuh suhthengna dinga jong chu abolpeh ding ahi.

Chule Aaron chu muntheng sunga thoidamna bol dinga alut a ama dingle ainsung ding chujongle Israel khoppilen dinga thoidamna agabola ahung potdoh kit masangsea koimacha jong kikhopna ponbuh sunga chu umthei louhel ding ahi.

Hita chu mi aumlou tengle Aaron chu ahung potdoh a Pakai angsunga maicham kitung chu ajot’a maicham dinga chu thoidamna agabolpeh ding, chujongle bongchal thisan them khat le kelcha thisan them khat cheh chu alah a maichama saki li chunga ageigola chu anunat cheh ding ahi.
Chujongle athisan them khat chu akhut junga alah a maicham chunga chu sagi veijen athin khum khum ding chuta chu Israel chate athen lounau jousea kona asuh ngima asuh theng ding ahi.
“Chuta chu Aaron chun muntheng lai le kikhopna ponbuh chule maicham athoidamna kin chu abol chai tengleh, kelcha ahing nalai chu ahinkaiya,

Aaronin kelcha hing luchanga chu akhut teni angap ding, chule achunga chu Israel chate themmona aboncha aphondoh soh keiya, asuh khelna chengseu leh achonset jouseu aboncha aphondoh peh ding; hita chu hijat pi chu aboncha kelcha luchanga chu akhuh peh jenga koi hita jongleh akigosa dema um jing mihem khat akaisah a gamlah a agathah mang sah ding ahiye.
Hitobanga chu kelcha chun amaho themmona jouse chu aboncha gamthip lam khat’a apoh mang peh ding ahi; hita hi Aaronin kelcha chu ahinga gamlah a alha mang ding ahiye.
“Aaron chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga hung lut’a muntheng sunga agalut pet’a akivonna jouse tupat ponnema kikhong ho chu asut lhah soh keiya, hikoma chu adalhah den ding;

chule atahsa jeng jong chu muntheng lai khat’a twiya kisil thengsel ding, chuta chu avon ngai ngai ho chu akivon kit’a hung potdoh pai pai ding, chutengle pumgo thilto ding chu atodoh ding, ama a ding jong mipi dinga pumgo thilto jong chu atodoh tha ding, ama dingle mipi dinga kithoidamna abol ding ahiye.
Chujongle maicham chunga chu chonset thilto sathao jouse chu agovam ding ahi.

Chule Azazel dinga kelcha hing galhadoh pen pen chu koi hijongle aponsil aboncha akisop lhah soh keiya, ama tahsa jeng jong twiya kisil theng ding, chujou tengleh ngahmun sunga hung lut thei ding ahiye.

Chule chonset thilto bongchal le chonset thilto kelcha, muntheng sunga kithoidamna dinga thisan hung kipolutsa chu, ngahmun polama poh doh a avun lhon le atahsa lhon, chule a-eh lhon ijakai chu meiya govam ding ahi.
Koi hijongle bongchal sa le kelcha sa gouva pang pen pen chun aponsil jouse akisop ngima, atahsa jeng jong twiya- akisil theng ding, hiche jou teng chule ngahmun sunga hung lut thei bep ding ahiye.

“Nang ho dinga hiche hi gui tanlou chonna-dan hi ding ahi. Lha sagi lhinna nisom lhin ni leh nang hon an na-ngol uva na natoh louhel diu, agamsung mi hiuvin lang nalah uva hung jin kholgam mi hijong leu chun na natoh lou heI diu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh hiche nikho chuleh nang ho suh thengna dinga nachunguva kithoidamna kibol ding ahin; Pakai angsunga chu nang ho nachonset chengseuva kona nakisutheng diu ahiye.
Hiche hi nang ho dinga cholngah nikho kicholdona hi ding ahin, chujeh a chu nang hon an na-ngol diu ahi. Chujongle hiche hi agui tan louva um jing ding chonna dan ahitai.
Chule kithoidamna dan hi apa pan muna kilheng doh thempupan bou abola akithenso thempupa chun tupat ponnem von jouse chu akivona abol ding ahi;

chule thempupa chun muntheng lai thoidamna jong a bola, kikhopna ponbuh thoidamna jong abol ding, maicham dinga jong abol ding ahi, Chujou tengleh thempu ho thoidamna abola, Israel chate jouse leh khoppi len dinga jong abolpeh cheh ding ahi.

Hita chu hiche hi nang ho dinga gui tanlou chonna dan hi ding; achonset jouseu jeh a kum khat sunga khat vei chu Israel chate jo’use dinga kithoi damna kibol jing jeng ding ahi,” ati. Chuin Mose’n jong Pakai thupeh bang bangin aboltai.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Aaron le achapate, chule Israel chate jouse jah-a seipeh-in lang hiti chun ajah a hitin hin tin, ‘Hiche thu hi Pakai thupehsa chu ahiye.
Israel insung mi khat touvin bongchal ham, kelngoi ham, kelcha ham khat ngahmun sung hihen lang ngahmun polam hijongle atha tah a ahileh,

ama chun asatha chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula ahinpoh lut’a, hiche chu Pakai angsunga houbuh maiya chu thilto dinga anei ding; amavang koi hijongle hita bol lou vang chun thisan asojeh-a chu mona apoh ding ahiye, hitobang mi chu amite lah a kona paidoh-a umsah jeng ding ahitai.

Hita hi Israel chaten tollhanga kilhaina abolnom jouseu jong chu amahon Pakai dinga thempupa henga ahinkai lut’uva, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbul ahinlhut tei tei diu, hichenga chu Pakai henga chamna thilto kilhaina gantha abol dingu ahi;
chutengle thempupan kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula kitung Pakai maicham chunga chu athisan a thin khum ding, chujongle Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hi dinga athao chu agovam ding ahi.

Hiteng chuleh amaho koimachan jong noti chona achonlo nau ahouvu mikel henga chu kilhaina gantha abol kit louhei diu ahitai. Hita chu hiche hi amaho dinga akhang khanguva chonna dan khat’ a um jing jeng ding ahiye.
“Nangman amaho jah a hi naseipeh a, ‘Israel insung mi khat tou ahiloujongle amaho lah a hung kholjin kholgam mi khat touvin pumgo thilto ham kilhaina gantha ham abola ahileh,
ijemtia hitobang bolpa chun Pakai henga kilhaina nei dinga kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula ahinkai lut louva ahileh hitobang mi chu amite lah a kona paidohjeng ding ahi.

“Israel insung mite khat tou ham ahiloule amaho lah a hung kholjin kholgam mi khat tou ham in thisan aneh khah tah a ahileh keiman hitobang mi thisan nepen pen chu kadouva, amite lah-a kona ama chu kapaidoh jeng ding ahi.

Ijeh inem itileh tahsa hinna hi thisana umah ahin, hijeh-a chu keiman hiche thisan hi maicham chunga nalhaogaovu thoidamna dinga kapehsa nahitauve; ajeh chu hiche hinna thisana um ahijeh-a hi hiche chun thoidamna anei thei ahi.
Chuti ahijeh-a chu keiman Israel chate jah a kaseipeh a, ‘Nalah uva um mihem koimacha chan, nang ho lah a hung kholjin kholjin mi hijeng jongleh thisan aneh thei louhel ding ahi.

Chujongle Israel insung mite lah-a mihema mihem kiti tapou, chule alah uva kholjin mi koi hileh sa gadela that-a ham ahiloule vacha kimat ham chun aneh theina dinga athisan chu alhoh lhah-a vut avuh khum ding ahi.

“Ijeh-inem itileh ganhing jouse hinna chu athisan hi ahiye; hichejeh a chu keiman Israel chate jah a kaseipeh a, ‘Nang hon ganhing jouse hi athisan naneh louhel diu ahi, ajeh chu ganhing jouse hinna hi athisan ahiye; koi hijongle thisan ne jouse chu kipaidoh ding ahi.

Chujongle koi koi hijeng jongleh, agamsung mi hihen lang kholjin mi hijongleh, sa moh thi ham ahiloule gamsan atha ham khat aneh khah a ahileh, ama chun aponsil jouse akisop ngima, ama jeng jong twiya kisil theng ding, chutengle nilhum keiya aboh a um ding ahi; chujou tengle bou theng ding ahi.
Amavang aponsil jouse akisop ngim hih a, ama jong twiya akisil theng louleh, ama chun athemmona akipoh den ding ahi. kati ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah-a seipeh tan, Keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu chu kahi,

Nang ho hi masanga nachen nau Egypt gamsunga nachonna bangu leh tua kahin puilut nau Canaan gamsunga mite chonna banga hi nachon louhel dingu ahi. Hiche mite chonna dan ho hi nang hon najui louhel diu ahi.
Nang hon keima chonna danjouse najuiyuva chule kachon dan thu jousea nachon diu ahi. Keima nang ho Pakai le Pathen kahiye.
Hichejeh a chu nang hon keima chondan jouse leh chonna dan jouse nanitjing jeng diu ahi, hicheng hi min ajuijeh-a, anitjeh-a hing ding ahiye, keima Pakai kitipa chu kahi.
“Nang ho pasala pasal kitipou pouvin akinaipi behseh ainko chu najot lut’uva anih nahopeh thei louhel diu ahi, Pakai kitipa keima kaume.
Nangman nanu sagoh keo tobang, napa delchen nalhap peh thei lou ding, nanu nihchen jong nahopeh thei louhel ding ahi; ama nahingnu ahin, hijeh-a chu nangman anihchen nahopeh thei louhel ding ahiye.
Nangman napa jinu nihchen jong nahopeh thei lou ding ahi; ajeh chu hiche jong chu napa delchen nalhap peh tobang ahibo’uve.
Nangman napa sung kon achanu hihen lang nanu sung kon achanu hijongle, nasopinu chu insunga peng den hihen lang kholgama peng hijongleh, anih naho peh louhel ding ahi.
Nangman nachapate chanu natu ham, ahiloule nachanute chanu natu nu ham chu anih nahopeh louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh natute nihchen kihopeh chu nangma a kihohdoh tobang bang ahiye.
Nangman napa jinu chanu, napa sung pengnu chu anihchen nahopeh thei louhel ding ahi; amanu chu nangma sopi ahibouve.
Nangman napa sopinu nih jong nahopeh louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu amanu chu napa toh kinai behseh asopi ahi,
Nangman nanu sopinu nih jong nahopeh thei louhel ding ahi, ajeh chu amanu jong hi nanu kinaipi behseh asopi ahibouve.
Nangman napa sopipa delchen nalhap peh louhel ding ahin, ajinujong najot lutjeng lou ding ahi, amanu chu nanu-ngah ahibouve.
Nangman namou nu nih jong nahopeh louhel ding ahi; amanu chu nachapa jinu ahibouvin, hijeh-a chu anih nahopeh thei louhel ding ahi.
Nangman nasopipa jinu nih nanopeh thei louhel ding ahi; amanu chu nasopipa delchen tobanga pang ahi.

Nangman numei khat chu anih nahopeh-a chule achanu jong anih nahopeh tha thei louhel ding ahi; chujongle nangman hiche numei nu chapa chanu chu hihen lang ahiloule achanu chu hijeng jongle anih hopeh dinga nakipui thei louhel ding ahiye; amaho chu nangma kinaipi tikhat nahipi ahibouvun, hitobanga nabol chu gitlouna ahiye.
Chule nangman numei khat chu asopinu hin lai sunga asopi chutoh kop'a anih hopeh dinga nakipui lut thei louhel ding ahi.
Nangman numei chu anih-boh neipet’a najot lut’a anih nahopeh louhel ding ahi.
Nangman kiphal tah-a nainhengpa jinu naluppia nagaisah louhel ding, hita chu amanu chutoh nachonset’a nakisuh boh louhel ding ahi.
Nangman nachate khat cha jong meiya govama Molech houna dinga naphaldoh louhel ding, hitobanga chu na-Pathen min nasuh thang louhel ding ahi, keima hi Pakai chu kahi.
Nangman pasal hi numei banga naluppi thei louhel ding, hitobang thilbol kiti hi thet umtah ahi.

Nangma kiphal tah-a nakipeh doh-a gancha toh nalup khoma hiche chutoh nachonset louhel ding, chujongle numei jong ama kiphal tah a gancha angsunga kido jenga akitimatpi louhel ding ahi, hita kibol chu chonset gilou chung nung ahiye.
“Thil hichengsea hin nang hon chonset bol hih heluvin; ijeh-inem itileh keiman nang ho masanga kanodoh namtin vaipi jong chu hichengsea hi anachon seuvah ahin,

hijeh a chu agam leiset jeng jong anasuh bohsau ahitai; chuti ahijeh a chu keiman athemmo jala talen kamatsah a ahileh, hiche phat’a chu agam leiset jengin jong asunga chengte chu ahinloh doh jeng ahitauve.

Nang hon vang keima chonna dan jouse le kachondan jouse nitsoh keiyuvin lang, agamsung mi hiuvin nalah uva hung kholjin kholgam mi hijong leu chun, hitobang thil thet umtah ho pi hi khatcha jong nabol louhel dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh hitobang thet umtah tah thil ho hi nang ho masanga hiche gamsunga anacheng ten anabolu ahin, hijeh a chu agam hi anakisubohsa ahitai.
Nang hon jong agamsung hi suboh leu chun, nang ho masanga anachengte namtin vaipi tobanga chu nang ho jong naloh doh jeng dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh koi koi hijeng jongleh hitobang thil thet umtah tah ho boldoh pen pen chu, mihem hitobanga chona bola chu amite lah a kona paidoh a um jeng ding ahiuve.

Hijeh a chu nang hon keima thu lhah chu nanit jing jenguva, nang ho masanga mihon anabolsa hitobang thet umtah tah chonna ho hi itih chan hijongle nabollouhel diu, kisuh boh na nanei louhel dingu ahi; keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu kahiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:
“Israel chate khoppi jah-a seipeh-in ajah uva hitin seiyin, ‘Pakai na-Pathenu keima kathen jeh a hi nang ho jong nathen dingu ahi,
Nang ho amitakip hin anu apa najabol cheh diu ahin, chule keima cholngah nikho jouse nanit soh kei dingu ahi; keima Pakai na-Pathenu kahi,
Milimdoi ki semthu ho hou din go hih heluvin lang, milimdoi kilhajol ho jong kisemthu din gel hih heluvin; Pakai na-Pathenu keima kaum nai.
“Ijemtia nang hon chamna thilto kilhaina gantha Pakai henga todoh ding nadeiyuva ahileh, nang ho le nang ho jeng jong santhei dolin kisem masauvin lang chutengleh toh doh uvin.
Nathiltou sa chu akitodoh nikho sung a neh jou ding ajing nikho teng toleh neh thei ding ahin; nithum lhin ni geiya avaldoh nalai vang chu ipi hijongle meiya govam jeng ding ahi.
Ijemtia hiche thilto chu nithum lhin nikhoa akineh khah tah a ahileh, athil kitohdoh chu apouvah ahitan, kisang thei lou ding ahitai.

Chule koi koi hijongle hiche sa nekha chan chun a themmona akipoh tei tei ding ahiye; ajeh chu aman Pakai dinga thil thengsa chu asuthangin ahi, hitobimg mihem chu amite lah a kona paidoh ding ahijenge.
Nang hon naleiset gau lhosoh nachop khom tenguleh, nalouvu chu apamchin gei geiya nachop khom lou ding, chujongle changphal nachom tengu jong leh changkhai gei geiya nachom tha louhel dingu ahi.

Nalengpigui jong akeohela nalochai lou ding, nalengpilei laiya lengpithei alhathang ho jong chu nalo ngim hel lou ding ahi; hiche ho chu mivaichate leh kholjin miho dinga nada lhah peh ding ahiye; keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu chu kahi.
“Nang ho naguchat louhel diu, amitinin aheng akom cheh chu jouva nabol dauva thujou naseipeh louhel dingu ahi.
Nang hon jouthua keima min napat uva nakihahsel thei lou diu, hitobanga chu na-Pathen min nasuh thang thei louhel ding ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahiye.
Nangman naheng nakom chu nabolgentheiya nachom louhel ding: thalah soh tohman chu nangman peh louva jan khovah kah jenga jong nakoiden louhel ding, jingkah khovah nalap den sah lou ding ahi.

Nangman nangong mi chu nagaosap louhel ding, chule mi mitcho masanga jong akipalna ding ima najampeh louhel ding, chusanga chu na-Pathen joh gin ding nakhohsah joh ding ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahiye.

Nanghon thu natan tengu leh adih louva natan louhel diu ahi; nangman vaicha chunga langneina nabola, milen dinga jong nalompeh chom lou ding ahi, amavang thu adih tah a naheng nakom thu natanpeh ding ahiye.
Nangma mihehse le le dinga namite lah a suh lhai toulhai natho louhel ding chujongle naheng nakom thina ding nagela nadou louhel ding ahi; keima Pakai kitipa chu kaum jinge.

Nangman nalungthim sunga naheng nakom chu nahot bol louhel ding, chuti sanga naheng nakom chu atohmo thudol phongtah a nakihoupi joh ding ahi, achutilouva ahileh achunga setna namoh lhut khumpeh thei ahiye.

Nangman namite chapa te chunga phulahjong nabol lou ding, tahsa lung nopmona jong nanei jing louhel ding ahi, chuti sanga chu nangma nakingailut banga naheng nakom nangailut joh ding ahi; keima Pakai kitipa chu kaum jinge.

“Nang hon keima chonna dan jouse nanit tei tei diu ahi. Nagancha chu jatchom khat le ja tchom khat nakimatsah a nakigaisah lou ding, nalou laiya jong muchi jatchom chom natuhal jeng jung louhel ding, chujongle ponsil jatchom choma kikhui von ho jong chu nachunga nakivon louhel ding ahiye.

“Pasal khat touvin huh man a soh numei, min achoh doh loulai, chamlhat kipe loulai, ahivanga pasal dang khat toh kitepsa khat tou aluppi tah-a ahileh, phatah-a kholtoh masah ding ahi. Anumei nu chu chamlhatsa ahilou lai jeh a amani chu thina chuhsah lou ding ahibouve.
Hintin amipa chun themmo thilto dinga ama ding mong monga kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu Pakai angsunga ahinkai lut ding, hiche themmona thilto ding chu kelngoi chal khat hi ding ahiye.

Hiche themmo thiltoa thempupan hiche mipa chu themmona aboljeh-a chu themmona thilto kelngoi chal chu amana Pakai angsunga thoidamna abolpeh ding; hiteng chuleh aman chonsetna agabol khah chu ngaidama um ding ahiye.

“Nang ho gamsung chu nahunglut tengu leh thing aga thei natu jouseu chu aga masa chengseu chu mihem cheptan peh ding tobanga nagel uva, kum thum sunga thingga ho chu cheptan louva na ngaito diu ahi; hijeh a chu athingga chu min aneh thei loulai ding ahi.
Kum li lhin kum vang leh thingga jouse chu aboncha Pakai henga thangvahna kut khat kibola kithenso soh kei ding ahiuve.
Hijeh a chu kum nga lhin phat vangle chun thingga jouse chu naneh thei dingu ahitan, nang hon gamga chu nang ho ding cheh a nakilo lo jeng thei diu ahitai, Pakai na-Pathenu keima kaum jinge.
“Nang hon sa tapou chu athisan puma naneh tha thei louhel diu ahin; phun jong nasan dauva mitpheldoi jong nachoi thei louhel diu ahi.
Nang hon nachalsamu nasom thei lou diu, chule nabeng mul jong among natan louhel ding ahi,
Nang hon mithi ho jeh a natichung na-atpop louhel diu, natahsa mong mongu jong imacha lim semna naman thei louhel dingu ahi; Pakai kitipa keima kaum jinge.
"Nangman nachanu chu notin pansah in lang kisuhboh sah hih helin, ajole agamsung pumpi jong notin pang jengin tin, hitia chu agamsung hi gitlouna hung dimhel thei ahi.
Nang hon keima cholngah nikho jouse chu nanit uva kamun theng jong chu najabol cheh diu ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahi.
“Themka ho heng jot dauvin lang doithemte jong don hih heluvin; hitobang ho chu gahol khoh dauvin, ajole hiche hoa chu nakisuh boh lo diu ahiye; Pakai na-Pathenu keima kaum jing nai.
“Nangma tehse lukang masanga nadindoh tei tei ding, upa maiya jong jabolna naneiya chule na-Pathen jong nagin tei tei ding ahi; keima Pakai chu kahiye.
“Nagamsunga chu kholgam mi khat tou nangma toh akholjin khoma ahileh, nang hon hiche kholjin mi chu adih louva nabol louhel diu ahi.

Nang ho lah-a hung kholjin kholgam mi chu nang ho lah a pengden agam mi tobang banga um ding, chule nangman hiche kholjinpa chu nangma nakingailut banga na-ngailut ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nang ho jeng jong Egypt gamsunga kholjin mi gahisa nahiuve; Pakai na-Pathen keima kahijinge.
“Nang hon nathutan nau pou pouva, thildung nate nau hihen lang thilvai nate nau hijongle chule thiljat nasim nau hita jongleh adih louva nabollouhel dingu ahi.

Thilleptoh na ho jong adih-a kitoh chet chet nakoiyuva, thilgih tenajong adih cha cha naman diu, ephah jong akitoh toh naman uva, hin jong adihcha cha naman diu ahi; keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu, nang ho Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh pau chu kahi jing jenge.
Hijeh-a chu nang hon keima chonna dan jouse leh kachondan jouse aboncha najuiyuva hichengse chu nabol jing diu ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:

“Israel chate jah-a seipeh inlang hin, Israel chate lah a mi mihem koi hijongleh, chule Israel lah-a hung kholjin kholgam mi hijengjong leh achate Molech houna dinga tohdoh pen pen chu thina chuhsah ding ahin; ama chu agamsung miten songa aselih jeng diu ahiye.

Chule keima jengin jong hitobang mihem chu kahin douva, amite lah a kona hiche mihem chu kapaidoh jeng ding ahi; ipijeh-inem itileh aman asung peng khat chu Molech hounan apen, hijeh chun keima muntheng asuboh tan, kamintheng jong asuthang tai.
Ijemtia agamsung miten hichepa chu achate Molech houna dinga apeh pet’a chu akimu mo sah cheh uva, hita chu atha dauva ahijongleh,
keiman hiche mipa douna le ainsung mite douna kamai kahinlah ding, ama jong ama nung juiya Molech houva noti chonna chonse se chu abonchauva amiteu lah a kona kapaidoh hel ding ahiuve.

“Mihem khat tou themka ho leh doithem ho tahsana amaho lama akaiya, chule amaho nung nunga chu noti chona achon jeng tah a ahileh, keiman hitobang mihing douna chu kamai kahinlah a chutengleh ama chu amite lah a kona kapaidoh jeng ding ahi.
Hichejeh chun nang ho le nang ho kithensouvin lang athengin umdoh jenguvin; ajeh chu keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu chu kahiye.
Chujongle kachonna dan jouse jong nanit uva hichengse nabol cheh dingu ahi; keima hi nang ho suthenga pang Pakai chu kahi.
Ipijeh-inem itileh apa ham anu ham gaosap mihema mihem tapou chu thina chuhsah ding ahijenge; aman apa ham anu ham agaosap ahitan, athisan achunga chuding ahitai.
“Pasal khat touvin aheng akompa jinu achonset pia ahileh ajongpa leh ajonbol nu chu anilhona tha ding ahilhone.
Apa jinu toh lumkhom pasal chu koi hijongle apa delchen alhap peh ahijengin, hijeh a chu anilhona tha jeng ding, athisan man lhon jong amani chunga akipoh jeng lhon ding ahiye.
Amou nu lup pi pasal jong chu, ama ahin amou nu ahin, anilhona thadoh jeng ding ahi; amanin chonset gilou tah aboldoh lhon ahitan, athisan man lhon jong achung lhona akipoh den lhon ding ahi.

Numei lup khompi banga pasal khat’in pasal khatma alup pi tah a ahileh, anilhona chu thil thet umtah aboldoh ahitan, hijeha chu anilhona thadoh jeng ding, athisan lhon amanin mona akipoh lhon ding ahi.

Numei khat ama jong anu jong ania aji dinga kipui tha jeng pasal chun thilse chung nung aboldoh ahitan, hijeh-a chu pasal pa ahin, anumei teni ahilhonin, abonchauva chu meiya govam hel ding ahiuve, hita chu nang ho lah-a hitobang thilse chu aum kit louna dingin.
Ama kiphal tah-a kipedoh a gancha toh lumkhom jeng pasal chu tha jeng ding ahi; chule akitimatpi gancha jong chu natha diu ahiye.

Ipi gancha hijongle nailut jenga kibolsah dinga kido jeng numei auma ahileh, nangman numei nu jong gancha jong chu natha jeng ding, hita chu anilhona thadoh jeng ding ahi; athisan jala mona jong amani chunga umden ding ahi.

“Asopi nu apa chanu ham anu chanu ham khat kipuiya pasal khat tou auma, chule amapa chun anih ahopeh-a chule amanun adel alhap peh-a, pasal pan jong akeova aum chu amupeh-a chule numei nun jong amapa akeova aum chu amudoh-a ahileh, hitobang thil hijachatna lentah ahin, hijeh-a chu anigel lhona amite cha le naote mitmu chang tah-a paidoh ding ahijeng lhone; amapan asopi nu nih ahopeh jengin, hijeh-a chu athemmona chu aman akipoh jeng ding ahi.

Numeiyin angaiya thi anei laiya pasal khat touvin alup pia, anih ahopeh a akeova ajama ahileh, amapa chun numei nu thisan hung londohna akeova ajam ahitan, amanun jong athisan phung chu ahodoh jeng ahitai; hijeh a chu amani chu anilhona amite lhon lah a kona paidoh jeng ding ahilhontai.
Nangman nanu sopi nu ahiloule napa sopi nu nih nahopeh louhel ding ahi; hita kibol chu min ainko chu akeova ajam ahitan, hitobang bol ho chun athemmona akipoh diu ahiye.
Apa-ngah jinu luppi pasal chun apa-ngah del alhap peh to bang ahitan, pasalle numei nu chun achonset akipoh lhona, cha neilouva thi ding ahilhone.
Asopipa jinu ji dinga kipuiya pasal chun then louna aboldoh ahitan, hiche pasal chun asopipa delchen ahopeh ahijeh-a chu amani cha hing louva thi ding ahilhone.
“Nang hon keima chonna dan jouse le kachondan jouse nanit soh keiyuva hiche ho chu bol jong nabol tah tah diu ahiye; chutile keiman nachenna diuva kapui lutna gamsung hin naloh doh lou dingu ahiye.
Chule keiman nang ho masanga kanodoh peh namtin vaipi chonna chengsea chun nang ho chon hih heluvin; ijeh-inem itileh amah on hichengse pi hi anabol jeh uva keiman amaho chu kakidah anahiuve.

Hijeh a chu keiman najah uva kaseiya, ‘Amaho gamsung hi nang hon nalouva chule keiman jong hiche gam bongnoi le khoiju lonna hi nalo diuva kapeh nahiuve,’ kati ahi. Mitin hijat lah a nang ho nalheng doh uva Pakai na-Pathenu chu keima hi kahi,

Hijeh a chu nang hon jong satheng le saboh nalhen khen’uva, vacha boh le vacha theng nalhen khen diu; hita chu nang ho le nang hon hiche ganhing ho hi hihen lang vachate hi hijongle chule tola kithol tho ho hijongleh kisuh bohna nanei louhel dingu ahiye; keiman hichengse hi aboh a nakoidoh jeng diuva kasedoh sa ahitai,
Kei dinga nang ho nathen tei tei diu ahi; ajeh chu Pakai kitipa keima jong kathengin, keima mi nahi theina diuva, mitin vaipi lah a kona kalhendohsa nahitauve.
“Pasal hihen lang numei hijongle themka pang ham, mitphel doithem ham chu tha jeng ding ahi; hitobang miho chu songa selih jeng ding ahi, athisan jal uva mona jong achunguva chunante,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin, “Aaron chapate thempuho jah a chun seipeh in lang, ajah uva hitin tin, ‘Mihing khat’a khatchajong aheng akom thi aga op’a kisuboh louhel diu ahi.
Aki-inkotpi akinaipi behseh anu ham, apa ham, achapa ham, achanu ham, asopipa ham ahi ngal louva,
nu-ngah laicha asopi nu ham ahilouva ahileh, asopi nu chu jipa neilou lai ahin, ama dinga ainsung mi mong tobang hina laiya ahin, amanu chung chang vanga chu athilong chu aop’a kisuboh thei ahinai.
Pasal jong chun amite lah a jipa khat ahiphat le kisuboh a, hitobanga chu amale ama kisuthang louhel ding ahiye.
Aluchangu akivel tol kom anei lou diu, abeng mul mongu jong akivochai lou diu, chujongle atahsauva jong mapon imacha anei louhel diu ahi.

Amaho chu a-Pathen dinguva thengsel uva, a-Pathenu min asuhboh louhel diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh amaho hi a-Pathenu neh ding changlhah thilto jouse Pakai henga hintoh doh ji ho chu ahiuve; hijeh a chu amaho thengsel diu ahi.
Numei notia pangsa leh akisubohsa jong akichenpi thei louhel dingu ahin, ajipan adasa numei jeng jong akichenpi thei lou dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh thempupa chu a-Pathen dinga kithensoa ahitai.

Hijeh a chu nangman ama chu nathenso ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh aman nangma Pathen neh ding changlhah atodoh ji ahin, nangma dinga jong ama chu atheng hi ding ahiye; ajeh pen tah chu nang ho thensopa Pakai keima hi katheng jinge.
Chule ijemtia thempupa chanu chu notia a pan jeng tah a amale ama akisuhboh tah a ahileh, amanu chun apa jong asuboh ahitai; hitobang numei chu meiya goyam jeng ding ahi.

“Asopite lah a thempulen pena pangpa, aluchanga kinuji thaotwi kisun khuma kinusa, vontheng jouse kivon dinga kithensosa chun asam alhaiya apul louhel ding, aponsil jouse jong a-ehsah louhel ding ahi.
Chujongle amapa chu apa hihen lang anu hijeng jong leh mithilong koma che lut’a amale ama kisuboh louhel ding ahi;

munthenga kona jong potdoh a a-Pathen muntheng lai chu asuh boh louhel ding ahi; ijeh inem itileh amah in a-Pathena akithensona thaotwi akinuna chu achunga akipoh le jing jeng ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahiye.
Hijeh a chu aman ajinu ding jong nungah theng ahipet’a bou akipui ding ahi.

Hita chu meithaisa hihen lang akidasa hijongle, ahilou jongleh akisubohsa numei hihen notia pangsa hi leh, hitobang ho chu khat’a khatcha thempupan jia anei thei louhel ding ahi; amavangjia anei ding chu amite lah-a kon mong monga nungah thengsel akipui ding ahi;
hita a bola ahileh amite lah a achate jeng jong chu asuhboh thei lou ding ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh amapa thensoa Pakai chu keima hi kahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Aaron jah a seipeh in lang hin, nangma son nachilhah te chu akhang lhum keiyuva khat’a khat chajong atahsa chunga lolhin louna nei jouse chun a Pathen henga changlhah thilto tohdoh dinga hung lut thei louhel ding ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itileh koi hijongle atahsa a lhin lelna neiya chu, amitcho hihen lang, a-elbai hihen, amai mapon le atum sao ham hijongleh,
mihem akeng phang ham akhut ham kisuh bohsa hihen lang,
ahilou jongle ating bong ham, adung nem behseh jeng ham, amit kisuh lou ham, tipat’a na ham, atibol ham ahiloule atilchang kisuchipsa ham,

Aaron chilhah lah a hitobang mihem chu koimacha jong tibu kimlou pum puma Pakai dinga pumgo thilto tohdoh dinga pang louhel ding ahi; ama chu atahsa a nolna nei mihem ahitah jeh a a-Pathen henga changlhah thilto tohdoh dinga hung lut louhel ding ahi.
Aman a-Pathen dinga changlhah kitohsa vang aneh theiya, hita chu atheng chung nung le thil theng dang ho jong chu aneh thei ding ahinai;

ahivanga pondal phung ahin nai lut’a maicham phung jong ajot lut thei louhel ding ahi, ajeh chu ama tibu kimlou ahin, keima muntheng asuhboh thei lou ding ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh thempuho suthenga Pakai chu keima hi kahiye,” ati.
Hiti chun Mose’n Aaron le Aaron chapate, chule Israel chate jouse jah a thu anaseiyin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:
“Aaron le achapate jah a chun keima mintheng asuhboh louna dinguvin, Israel chate thil theng cheng keima henga ahinto dohsauva kona akikangse theina diuvin seipeh tan; keima Pakai chu kahi.

Ajah uva seipeh-in, nang ho lah a nakhang khanguva nason nachilhah teu lah a kona then louna neipum puma Israel chaten Pakaiya athiltou thil theng ho chu a jot lut thei jenga ahileh, hitobang mihing chu keima angsunga kona paidoh jeng ding ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahi.

Aaron guiya peng mite khat’a khat chan jong miphah hihen lang athilonga natna nei hijongle athen masangsea thil theng ho chu aneh thei louhel ding ahi. Chujongle mi koi ahin, thilboh ahiye, tia kiseisa tongkha chan chu, mithi long tong kha hihen, botwi lonjeh a aboh a kisei mihem tongkha hihen,

aop’a kithol tho ganhing khat pen pen aboh a kiseisa tongkha hileh, abohna akilah khah thei mihem atoh khah na a kona aboh a aumna thei hita jongleh, mihem aboh ahina pou pou chu ipi pi thilboh hijeng jongle
hitobang thilboh tongkha a mihing chu nilhum keiya aboh a um ding, atahsa pumpi twiya akisila akide lhah louva ahileh ama chun thil theng ho chu aneh thei louhel ding ahi.
Nisa alhum teng vang leh amapa chu theng ding ahitai; hiche nung le chun aman thil theng ho jong aneh thei ding ahi, ijeh-inem itileh hiche ho ama dinga ahinna an neh ahiye.
Mihemin sa achama moh thi leh sahang lhasa chu aneh thei lou ding, aneh a ama le ama kisuboh louhel ding ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahi,’ ati tin.

Hijeh a chu amahon keima thu lhahna hi anit tei tei diu ahi, achuti louva ahileh amahon hichejeh a chu chonsetna aneilouva, hiche thil theng chu asuhboh tengu leh athilo dingu ahi; amaho suthenga pang Pakai chu keima hi kahi.
“Thil theng chu kholgam min aneh thei lou ding ahi. Them pupa henga kholjin mi hihen lang ahiloule asoh thalah hijongle thil theng chu aneh thei louhel ding ahi;

ahin thempupa chun ama mi hiding athilkeo tobanga um dinga asuma soh akichohsa auma ahivang leh ama chun thil theng jeng jong chu aneh thei ding, ahitai; chutobanga ainsunga peng den hon jong aneh diu an bang banga aneh thei cheh dingu ahi.
Thempupa chanu chu kholai mitoh akichen teng, amanu chun hiche thilto alheng ho chu aneh thei lou ding ahitai.

Amavang thempupa chanu chu meithai ham, akidasa ham ahiya chabeiya auma, anu-ngah lai banga chu akeova apa inlama ahung kilekit a ahivang leh, hiche nu chun apa an neh neh chu aneh thei jeng ding ahi; hijongle kholai min vang aneh thei louhel ding ahiye.
Ijemtia pasal khat touvin hetoh louva thil theng ho aneh khah tah a ahileh, ama chun athil man jat hopnga a hop khat akoibea, chujou tengleh thil theng chu thempupa agapeh ding ahi.
Israel chaten Pakai henga atodoh sau thil theng chengse chu thempuhon asuhboh louhel diu,
hita amaho chu atodoh sau thil theng ho chu aneh khah sah uva themmona le chonsetna akipoh sah louhel dingu ahi; ajeh chu keima hi amaho suthenga pang Pakai chu kahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Aaron le achapate chule Israel chate jouse jah a seipeh in lang ajah uva hitin tin, Israel insung mihing khat tou ahiloule Israel lah a kholjin mihing khat touvin akitepna hahsel man ham ahiloule ama deichom thilto dinga Pakaiya pumgo thilto atodoh tenguleh,
akisan thei tei teina dinga chu nang hon achal nolnabei khat, bongchal lah a kon hijongle kelngoi chal lah a hijongle kelchal lah a hijong nato diu ahi.
Ipi hijongle nolna um vang chu nang hon natothei lou dingu ahi, ajeh chu nang ho dinga nakisanpeh thei lou dingu ahiye.

Mihem khat touvin santhei tei tei dinga bong hon lah a kon hihen lang kel-hon lah a kon hijongle Pakai henga chamna thilto kilhaina gancha atoa kihahselna molsona ding ati hihen lang deichom thiltoa to ding ati hijongle ati bukimbou ato ding, athilto chu nolnabei hi ding ahi.

Nangman Pakai henga gancha amitcho, ati bukimlou, a pat chule atichung phah bam aboldoh ham chu nato thei louhel ding, hitobang hoa chu maicham phunga Pakai henga pumgo thilto jong nato louhel ding ahi.
Bongchal hihen kelngoi hijongle atibah kitoh lou ho chu deichom thilto dinga vang nato thei ding ahinai, ahinla hitobang chu kihahselna thilto molsona dinga vang kisang thei louhel ding ahi.

Gancha atilchang teni kigoibongsa ham kisuchipsa ham aki-attelsa ham ahiloule akiladohsa ham chu nang hon Pakaiya thilto dinga natodoh thei louhel diu, nagamsunguva jong kilhaina nanei thei louhel dingu ahiye;

chujongle na-Pathen henguva chu changlhah hi hen lang gancha hijongle kholgam mi khut’a kona nalah-u nato thei lou, dingu ahi. Hiche ho hin atahsauva nolna anei jeh uvin nang ho dinga nakisanpeh thei lou diu ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Bong hihen lang kelngoi hileh, kelcha hijongle anou aso teng, anou chu ni sagi sunga api toh kikhen kang louhel ding ahin, niget alhin kal vang leh Pakai henga govam thilto ding jenga jong kisang thei ding ahitai.
Chule gancha pi chu bongpi hihen kelngoi pi hijongleh nang hon nikhat sunga anou toh natha tha thei lou dingu ahi.
Chujongle nang hon Pakai henga thangvah thilto kilhaina gantha nabol tehgu leh santhei dingdola nabol dingu ahi;
thilto chu nikhat sungma kinejou hel ding, ajing jingkah geiya nakhovah den sah louhel diu ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahiye.
“Nang hon keima thupeh jouse nanit soh keiyuva, chule aboncha chu nabolsoh kei dingu ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahi.
Israel chate lah a keima hi athenga eikiphonjal jingna dinga nang hon keima min nasuhboh louhel dingu ahiye; nang ho suthenga pang Pakai chu keima kahin,
nangho Pathen kahina dinga nang ho hi Egypt gama kona kahin puidohsa nahiuve; Pakai keima kaum jing jenge,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh in lang ajah uva hitin seiyin, Pakai dinga phat tepsa kut nang hon jong athenga naphondoh dingu keima dinga phat tepsa kut ho chu hichengse hi ahiye.

Nigup sunga min na atoh ding, ni sagi lhin ni vang chu thip beh a kicholdo nikho hi ding ahin, athengsela kikhoppi kibol nikho hi ding ahiye; hiche nikhoa chu nang hon na natoh louhel diu ahi. Hoilai laiya cheng jeng jong leu chun nachenna mun jouseuva hiche nikho chu Pakaiya kicholdo nikho hi ding ahi.
“Hicheng hi Pakai dinga phat tepsa khoppi theng ahiuvin, hitobang nikho jousea chu nang hon aphat kitepsa dungjuiya miho nakou khom dingu ahi.
Lha masapen nisom le ni li lhin ni, chuche lha nilhah lam chu Pakaiya kalchuh kut hi ding ahi.
Chule chuche lha ma ma nisom le ni nga lhinni chu Pakai henga cholsolou changlhah kut nikho ahin; ni sagi sunga cholsolou changlhah naneh neh jeng diu ahi.
Ni masapen nikhoa chu nang hon khoppi theng naboluva, cholna thei lom na natoh louhel dingu ahi.

Ni sagi sungsea chu Pakaiya govam thilto nato to jeng dingu, ni sagi lhin ni vang chu khoppi theng niloupi ni ahin: hiche nikhoa chu nang hon cholna thei tom natoh imacha natoh louhel dingu ahiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang ajah uva hitin seiyin, ‘Keiman nang ho kapeh nau gamsung nahung lut’uva agamsung gamga nalo tengu leh nang hon nachangpal ga masapenu chu thempupa nahin choipeh dingu ahi:
chutengle nang ho chu santhei dola naumdoh theina dinguva thempupan changpal chu Pakai angsunga athenso ding ahi: ajing nikho cholngah ni ajing chuleh thempupan changpal chu athenso ding ahi.
Hiche nathenso nikhouva changpal natodoh niu chuleh kum khat lhingsa kelngoi nou achal khat, nolnabei khat jong Pakai henga pumgo thilto dinga nato dingu ahi.

Chule hiche nikhoa lhosoh thiltoa todoh ding chu suhlou chang chang bong neldisel ephah khat hopsoma hopni hiya, thaotwi toh kihalsa hi ding, hichu Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hisah dinga meiya kigouvam ding ahi; donthei lengpitwi thilto ding jong chu hin dim khat hoplia hop khat hi ding ahiye.

Hiche nikho masang, na-Pathenu henga thilto ding nahin poh lut masang seuva, nang hon changlhah jong naneh lou diu, changkanpoh kikang jong changlhah kisang gep jong naneh lou hel diu ahi; hoilai gama cheng jong leu chun nachen chen nauva hiche hi nakhang khanguva chonna dan hi jing jeng ding ahi.
“Cholngah nikho abei ni jinga pat, nang hon changpal nahin choiyuva thenso thilto nato niuva pat’a chu nang hon nasim pat’uva hapta sagi lhingset nasimdoh dingu ahi.
Cholngah nikho jat sagi lhin na ajing nikho geiya nisom nga nasimdoh uva, chutengle Pakai henga lhosoh thilto changthah natodoh dingu ahi.

Nang hon na in dunguva kona ephah dim khat hopsoma hop nia kisemdoh thenso thiltoa todoh dia changlhah lhon ni nahin choi dingu ahi; hiche changlhah lhon teni chu cholsosa kikangsa hiya, Pakaiya lhosoh ga masa thiltoa kimang ding ahi.

Chutengle hiche changlhah chutoh kilhona kum khat lhingsa cheh, nolnabei kelngoi sagi toh, bongchal gol khat toh, kelngoi chal ni toh nahinto doh tha diu; hiche gancha ho chu Pakaiya pumgo thiltoa kimang ding, lhosoh thilto ahin, donthei lengpitwi thilto ahin, aboncha chu Pakai dinga agimnam tuitah hisah dinga meiya govam ding ahiye.
Chujongle nang hon chonset thilto dia kelcha achal khat natouva, chamna thilto kilhaina gantha thilto dinga kum khat lhingsa kelngoi chal ni nato diu ahiye.

Chule thempupan hicheng chu Pakai angsunga thenso thilto hisah dinga lhosoh ga masa thilto changlhah chutoh, kelngoi chal teni chutoh athenso tha ding ahi; hichengse chu thempupa dinga Pakaiya thil theng hi ding ahitai.

Hiche nikho ma ma a chu nang hon khoppi len khat nakouvu va, hiche khoppi chu khoppi theng hi ding ahin, hijeh a chu thacholna thei natoh thilbol imacha natoh louhel diu ahi; nakhang khanguva hoikoma cheng jong leu chun nachenna chan’uva hiche hi chonna dan a um jing jeng ding ahi.

“Nang hon nagam sunguva louva chang na-at tengu leh nalouvu chu apam chin gei geiya akikhong hela na-at khong lou diu, chujongle nachang-atna nunguva changkhai jeng jong nachom thengsel lou dingu ahi; hiche ho chu mivaichate ding leh kholjin miho dinga nakhenpeh dingu ahiye; keima Pakai na-Pathenu kaum jingnai,” ati.
“Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah-a seipeh-ia lang hitin seiyin, ‘Lha sagi lhinna, chuche lha ma ma ni masa ni leh nang hon kicholdona naneiyuva khoppi theng khat nabol diu, sumkon namut’uva naphondoh dingu ahi.
Thacholna thei natoh jong natoh lou diu, chule Pakai henga pumgo thilto nato tei tei dingu ahiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Hiche lha sagi lhinna nisom lhin ni hi kithoidam nikho ahi. Hiche nikho chuleh nang hon khoppi theng nabol dingu ahiye. Hita chu an na-ngoluva Pakaiya pumgo thilto nato tei tei dingu ahi.

Hiche nikho hi nangho dinga thacholna thei natoh natohna dingu ahipoi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche nikho hi kithoidam nikho ahin, hijeh a chu Pakai na-Pathenu angsunga: nang ho kithoidamna kibol ding ahiye.
Koi koi hijeng jong leh hiche nikhoa an-ngol lou mi chu amite lah a kona paidoh ding ahi jenge.
Chujongle hiche nikhoa natonga mihem chu koi koi hijeng jongleh keiman amite lah a kona kasuh mang hel ding ahi.
Nang hon natoh ito bang hijongle natoh louhel dingu ahi; nachen chen nauva nakhang khanguva hiche hi chonna dan a pang jing jeng ding ahitai.
Hiche nikho chu nang ho dinga thengsela kicholdona hijeng ding, chule an na-ngol cheh dingu ahi; chuche lha, niko lhin ni nilhah lama kipat ajing nilhah lam geiya nacholdo dingu ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh-in lang hi tin seiyin, ‘Hiche lha sagi lhinna nisom le ni nga lhin nia pat ni sagi sung hi Pakaiya houbuh kut kibolna ding ahi.
Kut kipat ni chu khoppi theng nikho hintin, hijeh a chu nang hon thacholna thei na imacha natoh louhel dingu ahi.

Ni sagi sunga chu nang hon Pakaiya pumgo thilto nato to jeng dingu ahin; niget lhinni chuleh khoppi theng nabol kit’uva, Pakai henga pumgo thilto nato diu ahi; hiche hi khoppi theng ahitan, nang hon natoh thacholna thei imacha natoh louhel dingu ahi.

“Hichengse chu Pakaiya aphat tepsa kut ho chu ahin, hiche hoa dinga chu Israel chate nakou khomuva, khoppi theng nabol diu, thilto todohna ding leh pumgo thilto todohna dinga naman’uva, anikho khoa akibol ding dungjui cheh a chu govam thilto hihen, donthei lengpitwi thilto hijongle nato dingu ahin;
hichengse hi nang hon Pakaiya nathiltou, deichoma nathilto chengseu ahin, nathenso thilto chengseu ahin, nathilpeh chengseu leh Pakaiya cholngah nikho tampi nanit chengseu kisimtha louhel lai ahiye.

“Lha sagi lhinna nisom le ni nga lhin nia, nang hon gamsung lhosoh nakhop tup nikhou chuleh napat’uva Pakaiya ni sagi sunga kut nabol bol jeng diu ahi; kut kipat ni jong choldo nikho hintin, niget lhin ni jong chu choldo nikho ma ma hi ding ahi.

Kut kipatni ni masa ni chuleh nang hon thingga pha pha nalah uva, lusu thingna tampi nalah uva, thingboh pha pha nahe-lhah uva, vadung pang dunga huisum do nahe-lhah uva, hicheng chu nachoi diu, Pakai na-Pathenu angsunga ni sagi sunga nakipa pa jeng dingu ahi.

Hita chu kum khat sunga Pakai henga ni sagi sung leh kut khat nabol diu ahin; hiche hi nakhang khanguva chonna dan khat’a umden jing jeng ding ahiye; hiche kut chu lha sagi lhinna lha sunga naman dingu ahi.
Ni sagi sunga chu lhambuh sung jenga nachen cheh uva, Israel lah a agam mi hisa jouse chu aboncha lhambuh sunga cheng ding ahiuve;
hiteng chuleh nason nachilhah jouseuvin keiman Egypt gama kona Israel chate kahin puidoh chun lhambuh sung jenga kachensah jin ahi, ti ahinhet thei dingu ahi; keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu kahiye,” ati.
Hiti hin Mose’n Pakai dinga aphat tepsa kut jouse chu Israel chate henga aphondoh peh soh keiyin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Israel chate chu thu pen lang, mit louhela vah vah jeng dingin; thaomeiya vah ding olive thao nahin choipeh diuvin seipeh temin.

Kikhopna ponbuh sung, hettohsahna pondal kikhai khum polam, hiche laiya chu Aaronin hiche thaomei kivah chu avetjing ding ahi. Hiche thaomei chu Pakai angsunga nilhah a pat jingkah geiya kivah khovah vah ding ahiye; chule hiche hi nakhang khanguva chonna dan a pang jing jeng ding ahitai.
Aaron chun Pakaiya sana thaomei khom chunga chu hiche thaomei ho chu mit louhela kivah vah hinam, ti avet jing jeng ding ahiye.
“Nangman chang bong kigoidi sel jeng chu nalah a changlhah lhon som le lhon ni nasema nakan ding, lhon khat khat chu ephah dim khat hopsoma hop ni lhingsela kisem hi ding ahi.
Chule hicheng changlhah nasemsa chu nangman golnia nagola, gol khat cheh a chu changlhah lhon gup gup nagol ding, sana thengsela kisem dokhang chunga chu nagola nakoi ding ahi.
Changlhah gol khat chunga chu gimnam tui tah tah nasun khuma, hita chu hiche jeng jong chu mangmo thilto dinga changlhah chutoh Pakaiya govam thiltoa kitotha ding ahi ye.
Tantih neilou hela cholngah nikho seh a hiche ho chu Pakai angsunga kigoldoh jing jeng ding ahin; abei thei louhel ding kitepna khat’a Israel chaten manchah ding ho chu a to jing jeng diu ahi.

Hiche thilto chengse hi Aaron le achapate chang ding ahiuvin, amahon athilto chu muntheng lai khat’a aneh diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Aaron dinga hiche thilto chu Pakaiya pumgo thilto kitohsa, ama chan dinga thil theng chung nung ahiye. Hiche hi tantih neilouva um jing ding chonna din ahi.” ati.

Pasal khat anu chu Israel numei ahin, apa chu Egypt mi ahin, amapa chu kholai ahung lengdoh-in ahileh ngahmun sunga avale na a chun Israel chaten aum chah jenguvin, hichea chun Israel numei nu chapa chu Israel pasal khat toh akina lhontai.

Hichea chun Israel numei nu chapa chun Pathen min ataitomin agaosap tan, hijeh chun amahon jong ama chu Mose henga ahinpui yuvin ahi. Hichepa chu anu min Shelomith akitin, Dan phunga mi Dibri kitipa chanu anahi.
Chuin amahon jong hichepa chu ilo ding ham, ti Pakai lungdei amaho henga ahung kiphondoh kahsea dingin mihenna insunga akhum tauve.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati:
“Pathen gaosap pa chu ngahmun polama hinpui doh-in lang, chule aman agaosap pet japha jouse chun aluchanga akhut ngam cheh uhen, chujou tah chuleh khoppi pumpin amapa chu songin seplih jengu hen.
Chujongle Israel chate jah a chun seipeh-in lang hitin seiyin, ‘Koi koi hijongle Pathen gaosap pen pen mihema mihem kiti tapou chu auma ahile hiche mihing chun achonset akipoh jeng ding ahi.

Hijeh a chu koi hijeng jongle Pakai taitom pen pen chu thadoh jeng jeng ding ahi; khoppi pumpin hitobang mi chu songa aselih diu ahi, kholjin mi hihen lang agamsung mi hijongle Pakai min taitom pen pen chu thadoh jeng ding ahiye.
Chule mihem that mihing tapou chu koi hijongle thadoh ding ahijenge.
Mihemin gancha avoh lhuh a atha a ahileh aman akhel apeh ding, gancha hing khela chu gancha hingma ma apeh ding ahi.
Mihem khat chun ainheng agalveng asuh khah a amavo leh aman abol bang banga abolpa jong chu kibol ding ahi;

agu achang asuhboh peh ahile agu achang suhboh peh ding, amit asuh chot peh ahijongle amit suhchot peh ding, aha asuh lhoh peh ahile aha suh lhoh peh ding ahin, aman mi asuhset bang banga ama jong suhset ding ahiye.
Koi hijongle gancha vo-lhua thatpa chun akhel apeh ding ahin, mihem thatpa vang chu ama jong thadoh jeng ding ahibouve.
Nang hon kholjin mi hihen lang agamsung mi hijongle agoma danthu khatseh bou naman diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh keima hi Pakai kitipa nang ho jouse Pathen chu kahigele,” ati.

Hiti chun Mose’n jong Israel chate jah a aseipeh tan ahileh, hijeh chun amahon jong Pakai taitompa chu ngahmun polama ahinpui doh pai paiyuvin, hichepa chu songin aseplih tauve. Pakaiyin Mose thu apeh bang bangin Israel chaten aboltauve.
Sinai molsang chunga chun Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hitin aseiye:
“Israel chate jah a seipeh in lang ajah uva hitin seiyin, ‘Keiman nang ho kapehna gamsung nahung lut tengu leh agamsung jengin jong Pakaiya kicholdo kum anei ding ahi.
Kumgup sunga nangman nalouva muchi natua, kumgup sungma a chu nalengpilei nalho ngim ding, hita chu aga nakilo ding ahi.
Kum sagi lhin kum vang leh agamsung chun choldona khat aneiya, Pakaiya cholngahna anei ding ahin, hijeh a chu nangman nalouva jong muchi natu lou ding, nalengpilei jong nalho ngim lou ding ahi.
Changham keh ho chang lhung jong chu nangman na-at lou ding, chule nalengpilei lho ngim louva keh lengpiga chu nalo lou ding ahiye; hiche kum chu gamsung dinga choldo kum hi ding ahi.

Gamsung cholngah kum chun acham chama nangma ding hihen nasoh pasal ham nasoh numei ham ding hijengle, nasoh thalah hi hen lang nangma koma cheng najin lhung kholjin mi hijongle, nabonchauva dinga an neh nahin ngaitopeh jeng dingu ahinai.
Nagancha jouse jong gam sa nagamsunga um jouse dinga jong agamga chu an neh a anei dingu ahiye.
“Nangman kum khat sunga hapta sagi nasimdoh ji jia, hita chu hapta sagi mun sagi vei nasimdoh a ahitengleh abon bona kum somli le kum ko lhing ding ahitai;

chujou tengle nangman lha sagi lhinna chuche lha, nikho nisom lhin ni leh sumkon namut ging ding thongje jua nalha ding ahi; hita chu kithoidam nikhoa chu nang hon nagam sungu thongsoh a sumkon namut ginguva nathonsoh sah dingu ahiye.

Chule kum som nga lhin kum chu kum theng ahi, ti nanghon naphondoh uva, agamsunga chengte jouse henga chamlhatna naphondoh peh soh kei diu ahi: hiche kum hi nangho dinga Jubilee kum hiding, mihemin athilkeo cheh chu akinung musoh keiya, mihem jeng jong ama ama in cheh a kile soh kei ding ahiuve.

Hita hi hiche kum som nga lhin kum chu nang ho dinga Jubilee kum hiding: hiche kuma chu nang hon muchi jong natu lou diu, ama cham chama hung kehdoh changham jong chu na-at lou dingu, chujongle nalengpilei lho ngim loulaiya hung gadoh aga jouse jong chu nalo lou dingu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Jubilee kum kiti hi kum theng ahin, nang ho dinga atheng ahiye: hijeh a chu nang hon agamga aumsa chubou naneh dingu ahi.
“Hiche Jubilee kum hi ahiphat tengleh nang hon mihem chu ama ama goulo agouva chu naki nungle pehcheh diu ahi.
Nangman naheng nakom henga thil najoh ham hihen lang thil nachoh ham hijongleh, hiti thil joh le choh thudola chu nasopi toh adih louva nakibolto thei louhel dingu ahi.
Chule Jubilee kichai kal kum jat dungjuiya nangman naheng nakoma kona thil nachoh a chujongle akum jat dungjuiya gamga hung sodoh ding dola aman jong nangma henga thil ajoh ding ahibouve.

Akum jat chu tampi ahitah a ahileh nangman thil man natamsah ding, chule akum jat chu alhom nah laiya ahijongle nangman athil man jat nalhomsah ding ahi: ijeh-inem itileh akum jat dungjuiya chu aman nang henga gam ga amudoh jat chu ajoh ahibouve.
Nang ho khat le khat naheng nakom nakibol genthei lou diu ahi, chusanga nangman na-Pathen nagin joh ding ahiye: ijeh-inem itileh keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu chu kahi jinge.
Hichejeh a chu nang hon keima chonna dan jouse hi najuiyuva chule kachon dan jouse nanit diu, hichengse chu toh jong natoh doh dingu ahi: chutile gamsunga lung mong tah a nachen thei dingu ahi.
Agam jengin jong agamga pha hinso doh intin, chutengle nang hon na-oiva va naneh uva, asunga chu lung mong tah a nachen thei dingu ahi.
Hichea chu nang hon ijemtia naseiyuva, Kum sagi lhin kum tengleh ipiba ineh dingu hitam, eihon muchi chivo itu dauva, chang atlouva iumuva ahileh?’ tia nadat mou leh,
keiman kum gup lhin kum chuleh nang ho chunga kaphat theina kahin buh lhah ding, hiche kum chun kumthum sunga neh khamset gamga ahinso doh ding ahiye.

Ajeh chu nang hon kum get lhin kuma pat muchi chivo tupan jong leu chun lhosoh alui chubou naneh neh nah lai dingu, kum ko lhin kuma lhosoh sohdoh thah chu naneh masang seuva lhosoh lui chubou naneh jing nah lai dingu ahi.
‘Gam leiset hi joh mang hel thei ahi poi, ajeh chu gam leiset hi keiya ahin, nang ho hi keima dinga kholjin mi hung khopemle nahibouvui.
Hijeh a chu nachenna chan’uva hoilai gam hijeng jong leh gam leiset lhatdoh man napeh cheh dingu ahi.
“Nasopipa chu hahsatna achuh khah tah a hijeh a chu a leiset keh khat ham ahinjoh doh tah a ahileh, akiban joppi asopin ahung kithopia asopipa thiljoh chu aman alhatdoh peh ding ahi.
Chule ajohpa chun aleiset lhatdoh peh thei mi anei louva, a hivanga ama chu ahung haodoh theiya alhatjou ding dola aumdoh leh amatah in akilhatdoh jeng ding ahin,

hiteng chuleh agam joh dohpa chun ajoh doh apat akum jat asimtoh-a, ajohna pa henga chu apehbe ding dola kilom chengse chutoh aman apeh tha ding, chutengle anachopa chun agam leiset chu anungpeh ding ahitai.

Ijem tia aman alhatjouna ding a lhinga anei jou louleh, Jubilee kum hung lhun kah a dinga athiljoh chu achopa khut’a umden den ding ahitai. Jubilee kum ahung lhun tengleh athil chu achopan alhadoh ding, hita chu athil neipa chu athil nung chan kit ding ahiye.

“Kul kituh khumsa khopi sunga mihem khat touvin chenna in ajoh doh a ahileh, ajohpa chun ajoh nung kum khat sunga akilhat kit thei ahi; ijeh-inem itileh kum khat sunga chu aman alhatdoh kitna ding tha anei ahiye.

Ijemtia ain chu kum khat sunga akilhatdoh tah louva ahileh, khopi kul kituh khumsa sunga in kijoh chu anakichoh doh pa chun akhang khanga aneiden dinga suh det peh ding ahin, Jubilee kum hung lhung teng jongleh kilhatdoh thei chomdeh lou ding ahitai.

Amavang kul kikai khum deh lou khoneo dunga in kijoh ho vang chu tollhanga loujao ho bang banga kisim jeng ding ahi; hitobang ho chu lhat jong kilhatdoh thei ding, Jubilee kum lhun teng chuleh kilhadoh thei cheh ding ahiuve.
Ahin Levi mite chenna khopi dung, amaho chenphasa agou lou khopi sunga in ho ahivanga ahileh, Levi miho chun itih phat hijongle alhatdoh jeng theiyu ahinai.

Chule Levi mi koi tobang khat chun athaneina chu abolda a ahijongle chule alhatdoh louva ahileh, amaho goulo khopi sunga anakijoh dohsa in chu Jubilee kum lhun tengleh kipedoh tei tei ding ahiye; ijeh- inem itileh Israel chate lah a Levi mite chenna khopi jousea in ho jouse jong chu Levi ho goulo jeng ahibouve.
Chujongle hiche Levite khopi ho dinga kikhen gam leiset jouse jong chu kijoh thei louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi tonsot geiya agouvu ahibouve.
“Nasopipa avaichat behseh jeng tah a, nakoma chu ama le ama jeng jong akivah lel hel tah a ahileh, nangman amapa chu navah jenga, kholjin mi ahung khopem banga nakoma cheng jeng ding ahi.
Natona chu akan le apung lah peh hih hel ‘in, na-Pathen ging jon lang nasopipa chu nakoma achen thei tei teina dingin geljon.
Nangman ama chu akan dinga sum nabatsah louhel ding, naneh ding jong apung dinga napeh thei louhel ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh keima Pakai na-Pathenu kahin, nang ho Pathen hinge, tia Canaan gam napeuving kate, tia Egypt gama kona nang ho hinpuidoh pa chu kahiye.
“Hijeh a chu nakoma cheng nasopipa chu avaichat behseh tah a nangma koma ama le ama ahung kijoh doh tah a ahijongleh nangman ama chu soh banga navul thei louhel ding ahi;
ama chu nangma koma thalah soh bang le khopem banga chengjo ding, Jubilee kum hung lhun kah seh seh a bou nangma kin abol ding ahi.
Jubilee jou tengleh ama chu nakoma kona potdoh ding, achate jouse akipuiya chedoh ding, ainsung akilejot kit ding, hita chu apu a pate gou chu nung chan kit ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh amaho keima lhacha jeng ahiuvin, abonchauva hi keiman Egypt gama kona kahin puidohsa ahiuve; hijeh a chu amaho hi soh joh a joh doh louhel ding ahi.
Nangman jong amaho chunga hi engse tah a vai nahom ding ahipon, na-Pathen nagin joh a nahi ding ahiye.
Nangman soh pasal hihen numei hijongle nanei thei ding ahinan, hiche soh dinga chu nangman nakimvela cheng namtin vaipia kona nakichoh a navul thei ding ahi.

Nang hon nalah uva cheng kholgam miho lah a kona soh vul ding nakichoh thei diu, nagam sunguva peng den ho jong nachoh thei diu ahi; hitobang miho insunga kona nachoh soh a navul hou chu nang ho thilkeo tobanga um jeng ding ahiuve.

Chule nang ho soh chu nanunguva nachateu dinga agouvu hidinga nadalhah peh diu ahin, amahon atonsot geiya gouva anei dingu ahi; ahinla nasopiu Israel chate chunga chu khat’in khat chunga engse tah a vai nahomuva thu nanei louhel dingu ahiye.

Ijemtia nangma koma cheng kholgam mi chu ahaodoh tah a, chule nasopi khat akoma chengpa chu hahsat atoh khah a avaichat behseh jeng tah a, hijeh a chu ama le ama hiche kholgam mi nahenga khopempa henga chu ahung kijon doh jeng tah a ahileh, ahiloule amapa insung mite khat tou henga akijoh doh a ahileh,
hita ama le ama akijoh doh nungle chun lhatdoh kit thei ahiye; asopite lah a khat pen penin amapa chu alhatdoh ding,

ahilou jongle apa-ngah ham apangah chapa ham khat chun alhatdoh thei jong ahi; achutilouva ahijongle amatoh kinai tah aheng akom aphung goI chun ama insung to kinaipen penin alhatdoh jeng thei ahiye; chutilouva ama le a ma jong ahung haodoh tah a ahileh ama le ama jong kilhatdoh thei ahinai.

Ama anakichohpa chutoh akinop to dungjuiya aman ama le ama anakijoh doh a pat’a Jubilee kum chan gei chu asimdoh a, hichea chu akilhadohna ding aman jat chu akum tam le ihom dungjuiya apeh ding ahi; ama anakichoh pan ama anavul sungsea aman ding chu thalah soh man toh kibanga tep ding ahi.
Jubilee lhinna ding kum tampi aum nah laiya ahileh aman akilhatdoh na dinga anakichohna man chu akeh khat bang aledoh ding ahi.

Amavang Jubilee kum lhin nading chu kum lhomcha bou aum tah a ahileh ama kichohpa chutoh a kum jat chu asimtoh lhona, hiche kum jat dungjuiya chu atohman anatohna jat dungjuiya aval chengse chubou akilhat dohna ding anungle peh ding ahiye.
Tohman akisim teng chuleh amapa chu thalah soh thaman jat a kisimpeh ding ahi. Hoi hile hitobanga kijohdoh pa achunga engse tah a min vai ahom louna dinga navet tup ding ahi.
Hitobang hoa hi amapa chu akilhatdoh thei tah louva ahileh, ama chu Jubilee kum lhun teng lhadoh ding ahin, amajong achate jong lhadoh tha ding ahi.
Ijeh inem itileh keima dinga Israel chate hi lhacha jeng ahiuvin, amaho keima lhacha hiuva, Egypt gama kona keiman kahin puidohsa ahiuve; keima hi Pakai nang ho Pathen chu kahi jinge.

“Nang hon nang ho dinga milimdoi ho chu nakisem thei lou diu, milim kilhajol hihen lang song kitung hijongle natun thei louhel diu, nagam sunguva hi song kijempol jong natun doh thei louhel dingu ahin, hitobang ho chu naboluva hiche masanga chu naboh khup louhel dingu ahi; ajeh chu Pakai na-Pathenu keima kaum jingnai.
Nang hon keima cholngah nikho jouse chu nanit jing jenguva keima muntheng chu najabol dingu ahi; keima hi Pakai chu kahiye.
“Nang hon keima chonna dan jouse najuiyuva, kathupeh chengse jong nanit soh keiyuva chule hicheng chu bol jong nabol mong monguva ahileh.
keiman nang ho ding aphat cha gotwi kalhah sah a chutengle agam leiset hin gamga hinsep doh be cheh cheh jeng intin, chujongle tollhanga thingga jong hung haga cheh cheh ding ahi.

Hiteng chuleh nahaovuva changden le lengpithei ga lo kikai mat den ding, lengpitheiga lo le muchi tuphatjong kikaimat jeng ding ahi; chule nang hon na-oiva vauva an changlhah naneh uva nagamsunguva lung mong tah a nachen dingu ahi.

Chutah le keiman nagam sunguva cham kalensah a, nang ho nomtah a nalup’uva koima cha chan nang ho nahoh kichat kit lou hel diu ahitai; keiman gamsunga kona gamsa gilou jouse katolmanga, nagam sunguva jong chemjam hemhat a kinona hung kit louhel ding ahitai.
Nang ho joh chun namelmateu nadeljam jam dingu ahin, amaho chu namasanguva chemjama nasat lhuh lhuh jeng dingu ahi.

Nang ho mi nga seh seh in jong melma ja khat nadeljam jouvuva, chule nang ho mi ja khat’in melma sang som nadeljam jou dingu ahi; hita chu namelmateu namasang uva chemjama kisat chap chap jeng ding ahiuve.
Hita chu keiman nang ho khoh sahna kaneiya, nang ho kaphat thei sah uva najat-u jong kapunsah jing ding, chule nangho to kakitepna jong kasuh det ding ahi.
Nang ho nahaovuva lhosoh lhung luisa naneh nah lai diu, lhosoh thah hung lhung koina dinga aluisa chu nathet ngim tho dingu ahitai.
Keiman jong nang ho lah a chenna kakisem ding, nang ho hi kalung sunga jong kidah a kabol kit louhel diu ahi.
Chutengle keima nang ho lah a vah leng ting hita chu nang ho Pathen kahi ding, nang ho jong keima mite nahi dingu ahi.

Egypt mite soh a napan louna dinguva nang ho agamsung uva kona hinpuidoh pa Pakai na-Pathenu chu keima kahin; keiman nang ho namkol jol jouse kavoh boh soh hela nading janga lam kajotsah nahiu ahitai.
“Ahinla nang hon keima thu nangai pouvin, thupeh hijatpi jong hi nabol pouve;

hita chu nang hon kachonna dan jouse nadon dauva, nahin khouva keima chondan jouse kidah le hot’a naneiyuva, keima thupeh ho hi khat’a khat cha bol louva naum ‘uva, keima kitepnachu nasuhkeh joh uva ahivang leh,

keiman jong nang ho hitobanga chu kabol ding nahiuve. Nachunguva hetman louhela tijatna kalhunsah a, nabahgam hel diu kalhunsah ding, mit hadoh jou louhelna le haisam helna thei nat lhut nachunguva kahin lansah ding ahi. Nang hon muchi natuu jong mohseh hi ding ahiye; ajeh chu namelmateu vin aneh gam bep ding ahitai.

Keima tah hin nang ho kadou ding, hijeh a chu nagalteu masanga nakithat gam dingu ahi; nang ho deimo le hot’a nabolteu chu nachunguva leng chang diu, koima chan nahindel hih helu jongleh nang ho najam jamjeng dingu ahi.
Chule hiche jeng jong hi nahsah deh’ louva keima thu nangai louheluva ahileh, keiman nang ho hi nachonset chengseu jala ajat sagi veijena ka-engbol nah lai ding nahiuve.
Keiman nang ho kiletsahpi nathahat nau kasuh mang peh a, nachunguva van jong thih kahisah ding, naleiset jengu jong sum-eng kahisah ding,
chutengle mohseh a nathahat jouseu lha lhop soh ding ahitai; ajeh chu nagam lei set jenguvin jong aga sodoh thei tapontin, gamsunga thing phung jong agathei hung umdoh louhel ding ahitai.
“Hita chu nang hon keima neidou uva akaleh lama nachon jenguva chule keima thu nangai louvuva ahileh, keiman jong nachonset jouseu jala gamna hise hijatpi hi nachunguva kahin lansah ding ahi.

Chujongle keiman nalah uva gamsa hang tampi kahin lhalut peh uva, hiche ho chun nachateu nachomgam peh dingu, naganchau athagam’uva, nang ho jong nalhomsah tul tul jeng diu, hijeh a chu nalam lhah jouseu jong thip del ding ahi.
“Chujongle hiche jeng jong hin nang ho nasem phat deh hih laiyuva, nang hon keima neidou nah lai laiyuva ahileh,
keiman jong nang ho kadou diu, nachonset jouseu jeh a nang ho hi keima mong mongin ajat sagi jen a talen kapeh uva kasuhgam ding nahiuve.

Chule kitepna phu lahna dinga keiman nang ho chunga chemjam kahin lensah ding ahi; ijemtia nakhopi dunguva nakikhop tup’uva asunga nakisel thip denu jongleh keiman nalah uva gamna hise kahin lansah a, hita chu nang ho namelmate khut’a nakipedoh tei tei diu ahi.

Keiman nahin nau tenggol tobang changlhah chu kalah peh phat leh, numei som khat jenin jong thuh khatseh seh a kan kham bep changlhah aneiyuva, hiche jeng jong chu atena lhing bepcha natepeh diu, nang hon nejong leu chun na oiva deh louhel diu ahi.
“Hichan geiya jong chu nang hon keima thu nangai dauva, keima neidou nah lai laiyuva ahileh,
keiman jong lung phamo tah a nang ho kadou diu, nachonset chengseu jeh a ajat sagi veijen geiya keima mong mongin nang ho kalethuh ding nahiuve.
Nang hon nachapateu tahsa geiya naneh uva nachanu teu tahsa geiya jong nahin neh nah lai dingu ahi.

Keiman nang ho munsang jouse kahin suhchima, gimnamtui nahalnau maicham jouse kasatjal ding, chule nang ho tahsa thilong jouse jong chu milimdoi nasemthuu thilong ho chunga kaset thompeh peh ding nahiuvin, hita chu kahinkhoa kahot a kakidah ding nahiuve.
Chujongle nakhopi jouseu acheng bei akeova kalup sah a, namuntheng lai jouseu thip dela kaumsah ding, gimnam tuitah nalhut nam’u jong chu kanab peh louhel ding nahiuve.
Gamsung chu akeova kajam ding ahin, hijeh a chu agamsunga cheng namelma teuvin chutobanga aum chu adatmo lheh jeng dingu ahi.

Chutengle keiman nang ho hi namtin vaipi lah a kathecheh soh hel ding, nanung nunguva chemjam kasadoh a kadeljam diu, chutah le nagamsungu akeova kijama ahomkeova lum ding, nakhopi jouseu jong akeosa um ding ahiye.

“Nang ho namelmateu gamsunga nagatham laiseuva chu agamsung chun akeohela akijam chu kicholdona aneiya kicholdo do jeng ding ahi; hita chu agamsung chu kitha-ola, nomtah a cholngah nikho aman man jeng ding ahi.
Akeova akijamjam laisea chu agamsung chun kicholdona anei ding ahi; agamsunga nang ho nachen laiseuva cholngah nikho anamanji loujeh a hita chu um ding ahi.

Nang ho ahinga kidalha chengse jong chu amelmateu gamsunga achen nauva keiman alungthimu kasuh neopeh soh keiya, nathel khat lhah gin jenga jong mihem chemjam masanga ajam banga khu, kihonlul lula jam jeng ding ahiuvin, hita chu mihem khatseh seh in adel tengu jongleh matjel jula lhu lham jeng ding ahiuve.

Amaho chu koima chan del hih helu jongleh chemjam masanga min akihinso so na ding agela a jam bangajam ‘uva khat chunga khat kisethom thom jenga kibalhu chap hem hum ding ahiuve; hita chu nang hon nagalteu masanga pandetna thei thahat nanei louhel dingu ahi.
Namtin vaipi lah a nang ho namanthah gam diu, namelmateu gam leiset chun nang ho nabahgam dingu ahi.

Chule namelmateu gamsunga cheng nalah uva ahingdoh chengse jong chu athemmo achonset chengseu jala meisan gamsih seh ding ahiuve; chujongle apu apateu chonsetna chengse jeh a chu amaho abonchauva apu apateu banga meisan gamsih seh diu ahi.
“Amahon keima douna akaleh lam lama anachon’uva, kei douna joule nal a thil anaboluva hitobanga achonset nau le apu apateu chonsetna chu aphondoh uva,

hitobanga ana chon jeh uva chu ken jong amaho kadouva akaleh lam beh a kapuiya agalteu gamsung kahin puilut lo na jeh hi aphondoh theiyuva ahileh, chujongle hita chu alungthimu cheptan lou tobang atah belbul chu akisuh nem theiyuva amahon achonset nauva kona kisem phatna aboldoh thei tenguleh,
chutah le keimanjong Jacob to kakitepna kageldoh a, Isaac to kakitepna kageldoh ding, chule Abraham toh kakitepna kageldoh ding ahin, hitobangma a chu agam leiset jong kahin geldoh tha ding ahi.

Agamsung vang chu amahon adalhah nunguva akeova akijampet’a chu kicholdoa cholngah nikho aman man jeng ding ahiye; hichea chu amah on kachondan jouse donlou dailouva anakoiyuva chule ahinkhouva keima chonna dan jouse anakidah nauva achonsetna jouseu chu ahinsem phat dingu ahi.

Ahinla hichengse jal ahi amaho chu agalteu gamsunga achen tengu leh keiman amaho suh beihel dinga kagot’a donlou dailouva kakoi louhel ding, chule amaho chu kidah bola jong kabol louhel ding ahi, ajeh chu keiman kakitepna jong kasuhkeh deh lou ding ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh keima hi Pakai a-Pathenu kahi jing jenge.

Chujongle amaho Pathen kahi tei tei na dinga keiman Egypt gamsunga kona namtin vaipi mitmu chang tah a kahin puidohsa apu apateu toh kakitepna chu amaho khohsahna a keiman kageldoh ding ahi; keima Pakai chu kahi jinge,” ati.
Hicheng chonna dan jouse leh chondan jouse chule danthu jouse hi Sinai molsang chunga Pakaiyin ama le Israel chate kah a manchah jing ding ahi, tia Mose jah a anaseipeh chengse chu ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah-a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:
“Israel chate jah a seipehin lang ajah uva hi tin seiyin; Ijemtia mihem khatpen penin Pakaiya mihem Iongman tuh ding adeiya kitepna anei noma chule akitepna chu peh ding adei leh,
pasal kum som nia lhah chung lam kum somgup geiya alongman ding houina shekel dung juiya dangka shekel som nga hi ding,
numei ahivang leh shekel somthum bou amat ding ahi.
Mihem man tuh ding chu kum nga a lhah chung lam kum som ni gei chapang pasal ahileh alongman dangka shekel som ni hi ding, chule numei ahileh shekel som khat bou a mat ding ahi.
Mihing chu lha khat’a pat chung lam kum nga lhingsa geiya chapang pasal Iongman chu dangka shekel nga hi ding, numei ahivang leh dangka shekel thumbou hi ding ahi.
Chujongle amihing chu kum somgup chunglam ahiya, chule ama jong chu pasal ahileh alongman dangka shekel som le nga hi ding, numei ahivang leh dangka shekel som khat bou hi ding ahiye.

Ijemtia mihem Iongman pe dinga kiteppa chu avaichat behseh a alongman kituhjat chu apeh lei loma ahileh, aman aman tuhsa mihing chu thempupa henga ahinpuiya chutengle thempupan amihing chu alongman pe dinga kiteppa peh jou dungjuiya, ahaona le ajona banga aman atuhpeh ding ahi.
“Aman tuh ding chu gancha ahiya, mihemin Pakaiya thilto dinga ahinto doh ho chu ahiya ahileh, hitobanga mihemin Pakai henga thil atodoh chengse chu aboncha atheng ahiuve.

Min hitobang thilto ho chu apha le ase jong alheh thei lou ding ase le apha jong alheh thei lou ding ahi; ijemtia min gancha le gancha alheh to dinga ahileh, gancha akilhehpi ding leh akilheh doh pi chu ahoi hoiya anigel a athenga um lhon ding ahi.
Ijemtia agancha chu Pakaiya thiltoa to theidol hilou ganchaboh ahileh, mihempa chun agancha chu thempupa henga ahinkai lut ding,
chule thempupan agancha chu aman atan ding aphat le aphatmo dungjuiya aman ding boltoh ding ahi; thempua pang nangman aman natuh dungjuiya chu aman kitan ding ahijenge.
Ijemtia athil toh pa chun alhatdoh kit noma ahileh aman athil aman ding kisem jat chunga hopnga a hop khat apehbe kit’a akilhat ding ahiye.
“ljemtia mihem koi tobang ham khat’in ain chu Pakaiya athenso noma ahileh, thempupan ain chu aphat le aphat lou dungjuiya aman atan ding ahin, thempupan aman atuh banga umjeng ding ahi.
Hichea chu ain tohdoh pa chun ain chu akilhatdoh nom kit’a ahileh aman kituh jat chunga chu hopnga a hop khat sum apeh be ding, chutengle ain chu ama chang ding ahitai.

“ljemtia mihing khat touvin ama gam leiset agoulo phabep chu Pakaiya athensoa apeh doh noma ahileh, nangman agamsunga muchi chivo kimujat dungjuiya chu aman ding natuh peh ding ahin; hichea chu sakol chang homer dim khat muchi kitujou helna leiset man chu dangka shekel som nga man a natan ding ahi.
Aman Jubilee kuma hiche alou mun chu athensoa atodoh ahileh, nangman aman natuh jat jat’a chu kitan jeng ding ahi;

amavang alou mun chu Jubilee kum kichai nunga athensoa atodoh ahileh, thempupan alou man ding sum chu Jubilee hung lhin kitna ding kum jat dungjuiya chu asimtoh a, chutengle a man kituh jat’a kona chu asum chu lah doh ding lhomsah ding ahiye.
Chule ijemtia alou mun tohdoh pa chun akilhatdoh kit noma ahileh, aman kituh jat chunga chu sum hopnga a hop khat apehbe ding, chujou tengleh alou mun chu ama chang den ding ahitai.
Amavang aman alou mun chu alhatdoh nom hih-a michom dang khat koma lou mun chu ajoh doh tah-a ahileh, alou mun chu aitih-a jong kilhatdoh kit louhel ding ahitai;

hiteng chule Jubilee kum ahung lhuna alou mun chu akilhadoh ding phat leh Pakai dinga athenga kikoi ding ahi, ajeh chu alou mun chu akikatdohsa ahitai; thempupan alou mun chu agouva anei dinga akilo ding ahi.
Chule mihem khat’in suma achohdoh lou mun, ama goulo mong mong hi lou khat chu Pakai dinga athensoa atodoh tah a ahileh,

thempupan aman jat ding chu Jubilee kum hung lhun kah a um nalai ding kum jat dungjuiya a tam le alhom ding aman atuh ding, hichea chu amihem pa chun hiche nikho ma ma a chu amanjat kituh sum chu apehjenga Pakaiya athenga kikoi ding ahi.
Jubilee kum ahung lhun tengleh alou mun chu amasanga gouva ana neipa, akichohna pa henga chu kinung le kit ding ahiye.
Thil man kitan jouse chu aboncha munthenga shekel dungjuiya kitan ding ahin; shekel khat chu gerah som ni alhinge.
“Gancha peng masa jouse hi Pakaiya ahijeh-in, koimachan jong gancha peng masa chu achombeh-a athensoa atodoh thei lou ding ahi; bong hihen lang kelngoi hijongle apeng masa chu Pakai chan ahibouve.

Amavang agancha chu ganchaboh ahivang leh aneipa chun nangma mantuh jat dungjuiya akile choh kit ding ahin, amanjat hopnga a hop khat toh apeh tha ding ahiye; ahilouva akilhatdoh louva ahile nangman a man jat natuhsa dungjuiya chu kijoh thei ding ahijenge.

“Ipi pi thil hijeng jongle mihemin anei chan, mihing hihen lang gancha hihen lang, agoulo alou mun hijongle aman Pakaiya atodoh tapou chu akijoh le joh jeng ding ahiloule lhatdoh tei tei ding ahi; akitohdohsa thil tapou chu Pakai dinga atheng chung nung ahitai
Mihem akitohdohsa, ahivanga amite lah-a kona suhmang hel dinga umdoh pa vang chu min achoh doh thei louhel ding ahin, thadoh tei tei ding ahijenge.
“Gamsunga hopsom aboncha hi, gamsunga muchi chivoa kon hopsom hihen lang, thingga louga a kon hopsom hijongle aboncha Pakaiya ahi; hopsom chu Pakai dinga atheng ahiye.
Mihem khat touvin ahopsom chu alhatdoh noma ahileh, ama chun ahopsom jat hopnga a hop jat hop khat apehbea akilhat ding ahi.

Chule gancha hopsom kitipou pou, bong hopsom hihen lang, kelngoi hon hopsom hihen lang, ipi hopsom hijong leh gancha som khat lhinna jouse, gancha chingpa tenggol noiya kijot le gancha kiti tapou chu Pakai dinga atheng hi ding ahi.

Hopsom lah a chu min apha le ase alhenkah thei louhel ding, hopsom khela jong adang kipe thei louhel ding ahi; min hiche hopsom chu kikhel dinga adeiya alheh a ahileh, hopsom chule hopsom toh akhel thil jong chu anigela athenga um jeng ding ahitai; hiche teni chu koiman alhatdoh thei louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Hicheng thupeh hijatpi hi Sinai molsang chunga Pakaiyin Israel chate jouse dinga Mose koma anathupeh ho ahisoh keiye.
